name: Adam Schiff
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Our end-of-month deadline is a few hours away.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=229%2E5257348%2EYkoH3c)
I promise to make this quick, Derek.
Our end-of-month deadline is a few hours away. It’s critical we hit our goal so we have the resources to reach voters in my new district before our June 7 primary. We must protect our House majority and continue fighting for progress.
But we’re still behind. And need to catch up.
I’m humbly asking for your support — can you rush a donation to our campaign right now and help us hit our goal? When we’re this close to reaching our deadline, any amount helps.
Here’s a secure link to give: [**secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&refcode2=229_5257348_YkoH3c&akid=229%2E5257348%2EYkoH3c)
Thanks for everything. Seriously.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=229%2E5257348%2EYkoH3c) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=229%2E5257348%2EYkoH3c)**

name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: less than 4 hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, here’s the
situation:

Right now, our campaign is just 4% shy from reaching our April fundraising
goal. We’re so, so, so, close to pulling this off — but now we need to
finish the job.

Charles asked me to text him in a bit to let him know if we’re on track to
make it in time. So before I give him another update, I’m coming to you to
ask for a favor:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17984?refcode=em20220430-1852&t=1001&akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w ]Can you chip in $40, $4, or **anything you can** to help us hit our
goal before midnight tonight? We’re relying on last-minute donations from
this email to cross the finish line and make sure we have the funds we
need to compete against Rand Paul’s big-money donors.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17984?refcode=em20220430-1852&t=1002&akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w ][IMG]

Peter, I can’t
emphasize enough how important it is that we hit our goal tonight.

The stakes are higher than ever. This past month, we learned exactly how
much Rand Paul would rather play political games than do the right thing.

At the beginning of the month, Rand Paul intentionally delayed the vote to
confirm Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court and then ended
up voting against her confirmation.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17984?refcode=em20220430-1852&t=1003&akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w ][IMG]Then after Russia invaded Ukraine, Rand Paul was busy making
excuses for Russia’s involvement, pushing Putin’s propaganda.

We’re sick and tired of Rand Paul using his political power to play games.
Rand’s reckless “leadership” is nothing new. For the past decade he’s been
in office, he has consistently ignored Kentuckians and their needs. He’s a
politician who will say or do anything to get in the news, put the
spotlight on himself and his conspiracy theories, and sell us out to big
industries.

Enough is enough. It’s going to take a grassroots effort to take Rand out
of office but if we work together — I know this movement can move
mountains.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17984?refcode=em20220430-1852&t=1004&akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w ]If we want to be ready for this fight, we must hit our goal tonight.
Peter, there’s
less than 4 hours left until our midnight deadline: Please chip
in $5 or anything you can now to help us close our
fundraising gap.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/17984?refcode=em20220430-1852&t=1023&akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w ]Contribute $5

Let’s do this,

Leo

Deputy Campaign Manager for Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220430-1852-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1852_346206_RpSu0w&akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1852%2E346206%2ERpSu0w

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Leslie's iPhone
subject: Urgent – we’re behind…
body:
We only have a few weeks left before the Primary election. Hi, it's Leslie.I just received an urgent message from my finance team and wanted to share it with you as soon as possible:**I 'm reaching out because we're BEHIND on our huge End-of-Month deadline ending at MIDNIGHT tonight.** Will you help me crush our goal to show we're the clear Conservative frontrunner in this election? [_I need my closest supporters to show they have my back by standing with me tonight ..._](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-r/)Here's a secure link to my donation page: [_https://secure.winred.com/leslierutledge/secure_email_endofmonthdeadline_](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-y/)**Can I count on you to contribute $35 or more to make sure we reach our important goal?** If we don't hit our goal, my opponents will see my fundraising numbers and write off this race as an easy victory. We're less than a month away from the Arkansas 2022 Primary election...we've simply come too far to lose.I'm on the frontlines in this battle and ready to keep up the fight against Joe Biden's disastrous agenda from ever reaching Arkansas - **are you with me?**[**_Will you chip-in whatever you can here?_**](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-j/)[ ](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-t/)Even $25 will help get us across the finish line of our important goal tonight.I'm beyond grateful for supporters like you. Governor_ Sent from my iPhone [](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-d/)[](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-h/)[](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-k/) | [Unsubscribe](https://leslierutledgeforlgar.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bdjwhy-ikwuutulr-u/)

name: Joseph Geevarghese
subject: Powering Nina to the finish line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis,

Nina Turner’s election is this Tuesday and we need your help.

This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 — and the billionaires know it. They’re pouring millions and millions into **dark money SuperPACs** to spread lies they think can stop Nina and our movement from winning this seat in Congress.

**That’s why Our Revolution activists are rising up against the forces of Big Money** trying to buy this race. This weekend, our grassroots army is working around the clock to counter _massive negative advertising with massive one-on-one voter outreach_.

[Even though we can’t outspend the opposition, we know we can out-organize them with your support. Will you chip in and help Our Revolution scale up our voter outreach before tonight’s critical budget deadline and get Nina over the finish line?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev_2204&amount=15&refcode=OR_EM_FR_3MO_20220430_8_3?t=11&refcode2=2857_5885482_D9gaqe&akid=2857%2E5885482%2ED9gaqe) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately._ | | [CHIP IN $15 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5389?amount=15&refcode=OR_EM_FR_3MO_20220430_8_3&t=12&akid=2857%2E5885482%2ED9gaqe)

name: Charles (sent from my iPhone)
subject: Writing from the car
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, Peter, it’s
Charles.

I just had a phone call and the team gave me some updates:

1. Right now, we’re just 17 days away from the primary. We just made major
investments in launching our TV ads, printing more yard signs, and
mobilizing our organizing teams across Kentucky. We’re giving it all we
got to make sure we show off the strength of our movement on May 17.

2. But they also just informed me that we’re still a little over 200
donations short from reaching our end-of-month goal tonight.

I told the team that I trust y’all to pull through and help make sure we
have the funds it’ll take to get through this primary + show Rand Paul
we’re ready to take his seat.

I'm on the way to an event, but before I get out of the car, I have to
ask...

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18014?refcode=em20220430-1848&t=1001&akid=1848%2E346206%2EuYmxfd ]Will you please chip in $5 or anything you can right now
to help us reach our end-of-month goal? We want to raise 7,500 grassroots
contributions of any amount to fund our people-powered campaign. The
deadline is midnight tonight so I'm really counting on your support.

Thank you so much for everything. 🙏

— Charles

Sent from my iPhone

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1848%2E346206%2EuYmxfd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: The Dems are so scared they're SUING!

body:

**We're so close!** [**Can you pitch in a small donation of $1, $3, or $5 to help me hit that goal?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=ea386c11666543da8b8d5f30dadfbf7e&_e=IDujnrzhT1QaBKq58PdYTYgdkM04dIriGAW1pppywmdGxhrseQg3LQxRxTyE0W4_aWlboA_KDi5WCSWVXow1Mp7Ebhg1iE3ZuSqUWK-E8gItdjlF0wXbJVjIsOSJEqVMWcLAfEDzPn6oXttEuQUYY_piEy7OWJ_IrpXYwsvvjnfJBch4sjHzqFNZC9VlS6NO-dh2kDZX5ce1yRZiQiZUr19_jyP0cnEj4Sr_Y3x8K_hM2SZmpfeReHYI7iZVwb-BYeoW14QMJTNSOPHexkKRwBh50PVg4IkqVfKureYUYwkkgAUYVP3bhU4JveDQ8pmKZ-dceIudF1gFDKKh5TnHMe5ZghvUjUH5mJsh1aWJx3WmuRDFadpZYK0xkNYuX7ffIEPPhHZEbL8d1W4FFQwBr7_nKLKKfAI1YlkfGi5l_K0%3D)

I know it doesn't seem like much but even just $1 can reach a handful of voters with digital ads, $3 is enough for multiple mail pieces to undecided voters. [**No support is too small when it comes to this campaign.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=ea386c11666543da8b8d5f30dadfbf7e&_e=IDujnrzhT1QaBKq58PdYTYgdkM04dIriGAW1pppywmdGxhrseQg3LQxRxTyE0W4_aWlboA_KDi5WCSWVXow1Mp7Ebhg1iE3ZuSqUWK-E8gItdjlF0wXbJVjIsOSJEqVMWcLAfEDzPn6oXttEuQUYY_piEy7OWJ_IrpXYwsvvjnfJBch4sjHzqFNZC9VlS6NO-dh2kDZX5ce1yRZiQiZUrwTbruXvUTwKkzwZB5iiqexRg80P4QDQNzBy5jNHTYW_6zrJWNab-wyY8tz_U2228iQr0g3qv_zzriyrEaiMiR6I0PIYZP_DbrNDycf4TEFAdzFXQoEU2uaWS5bhXA-SzmkFuzAfQOMUT10bfl8jGS9xZqRlfQCXPZicPS1xy0S-pgDU2jBnR2KcxKtDqfduPoG_lvnKBV57UPGn4x1rbs4%3D)

Help me take back my community and fight for a conservative local government that we all deserve.

Thank you,
**Joe Arpaio**

**From:** Joe Arpaio
**Date:** Friday, April 29, 2022 8:49 PM
**To:** [<dpwillis67@gmail.com>](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=ea386c11666543da8b8d5f30dadfbf7e&_e=IDujnrzhT1QaBKq58PdYTYgdkM04dIriGAW1pppywmdGxhrseQg3LQxRxTyE0W4_aWlboA_KDi5WCSWVXow1Mp7Ebhg1iE3ZuSqUWK-E8gItdjlF0wXbJVjIsOSJEqVMWcLAfEDzPn6oXttEuQUYY_piEy7OWJ_IrpXYwsvvjnfJBch4sjHzqFNZC9VlS6NO-dh2kDZX5ce1yRZiQiZUr4-veaK6uTM7sanU2DpPgw4xbFOCVFGhCvRxS6BdEOYYXExk_ydSkh946_yjMHN7F6FjaNiHqaQ6Iqpc2mTnp2ePSqhVM5fDfvZmKiGdwIpMVbXvPJUDVaohNHt0d6iuK8EmAno_nHcIWSiglpSRjlmQx_USZWp6lXJvJuRoCL2g6rrecxDPpoQCgMMnjF1kmSt7kwhNSjdBHEal97ekpE8%3D)
**Subject:** Need your help

[](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=ea386c11666543da8b8d5f30dadfbf7e&_e=IDujnrzhT1QaBKq58PdYTYgdkM04dIriGAW1pppywmdGxhrseQg3LQxRxTyE0W4_aWlboA_KDi5WCSWVXow1Mp7Ebhg1iE3ZuSqUWK-E8gItdjlF0wXbJVjIsOSJEqVMWcLAfEDzPn6oXttEuQUYY_piEy7OWJ_IrpXYwsvvjnfJBch4sjHzqFNZC9VlS6NO-dh2kDZX5ce1yRZiQiZUrwU98HOXsMlOcPmdFx31j5bykQ4jrIsjsZ36Buvj3MMgV0_kHbfm9QwghAYmbwQ5v625hVenKqE3dw85yOJLDr36ds-iw9sO_3hBqL7dHvX1T5S0HD7uJ5o3fTezWYkctHKVReSW7ESKUt9Jt31KgbCe6ZBJkWNRNiyRhbLyNTfaICgjKUOUkW7mhIsonRv3yYm1YNqdqGWL0lzN1JX7VW0%3D)

---
You agree that local is better, right Fellow American?

**I'm asking because that's what we're fighting for here. A local community fighting for local solutions instead of more bureaucratic red tape that fails to help the people in need.**

body:
This is devastating.
_We fell short of our goal last night by just a few contributions -- and we never got one from your zip code!_
But we're giving everyone on this list a second chance. [**Because this is so important, we 're offering you a one-time 300% match on ANY contributions you make within the next 4 hours.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281843:6wry2HoNX:m:1:3299561967:2734F6DBEF183846A5879638CF1C0A74:r)
**[LAST CALL: GET 300% MATCHED >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281843:6wry2HoNX:m:1:3299561967:2734F6DBEF183846A5879638CF1C0A74:r)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
Sender: Steve Scalise
Subject: won't ask for another PENNY from you
Patriot, it's Steve Scalise and I'm going to level with you right now: **if every single Republican reading this email gave our average grassroots contribution of just $23 before our midnight deadline, I wouldn 't have to ask you for another PENNY _ever again_ to fund our red wave.**
Look, I know you may get hundreds of emails each month asking for the spare change in your pocket -- [**but here 's why your contribution of just $23 (or whatever you can spare) goes so much further today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281844:6wry2HoNX:m:1:3299561967:2734F6DBEF183846A5879638CF1C0A74:r)
As the Republican Whip, I've worked with my colleagues to shut down Nancy Pelosi's political career, turn the lights off on the Radical Left movement, and stop Joe Biden's Socialist agenda in its tracks. **Republicans in Congress have accomplished a lot this year, but it was ONLY because of donors like yourself stepping up when I needed you most.**
Republicans have a once-in-a-century chance to win back the House with historic margins and shut down Joe Biden's agenda for the rest of his Presidency._That's why I need you with me on this._
[**Chip in Just $23 to Take Back the House >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281844:6wry2HoNX:m:1:3299561967:2734F6DBEF183846A5879638CF1C0A74:r)
**My promise to you today is this:** if you -- and every Republican reading this email -- makes a $23 contribution before closing out of this email, we'll be able to fully fund ALL our campaign operations in every single battleground race in America.
_**And it might even be enough to get President Trump to run again ...**_
[**Chip in just $23 right now so I can fulfill my promise to you and save America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281844:6wry2HoNX:m:1:3299561967:2734F6DBEF183846A5879638CF1C0A74:r)
Thank you for your continued support. I can't wait to see what else you and I will accomplish this year while working together.
Best,
Steve Scalise
Republican Whip

What better way for the Never-Trumpers and the Democrats to defeat me... no, not at the ballot box. But by abusing the law to disqualify me from running - or bleed me dry trying to defend myself in court. name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: The Deadline Ends Tonight!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Hi Peter, can you help us reach our goal before midnight tonight? We need to raise an additional $650 in the next several hours!
Hi Peter,**We have made significant progress, but we are still $650 behind our April fundraising goal.[Can you help us?](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zudtukl-idtjvlhlh-r/)** _**We must reach our goal before midnight tonight.**_ Nancy Pelosi has been calling far-left millionaires from New York to San Francisco. **She has been asking them to pour money into the Democrats' coffers to try and unseat me.** I've been named a top target by Nancy Pelosi, and she is monitoring this race closely. **We cannot let Pelosi add to her majority in Congress.** I need your help.Our country can't afford the Democrats' one-party rule for another two years. The out-of-touch policies of the Democrats are crushing families and workers.**_We need to stop the out-of-control spending, secure our southern border, repeal overreaching government mandates, lower taxes for families and workers, and restore public safety in our communities._****[But, we cannot do it without your help. Please consider donating here to help us reach our fundraising goal before midnight tonight. It's critical we have the resources we need to spread our message before the election.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zudtukl-idtjvlhlh-y/)** Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Donate Now](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zudtukl-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zudtukl-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zudtukl-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zudtukl-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zudtukl-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: I’m tired of republicans who bow to Pelosi
body:
Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp6c1qt9pf53kb1qu54l8882bdjb7m5i1f7ihio0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongeip60ppjmkpn8ppn6lpj2p75c9gebd1gcoo62s726lhr0t9hmupn1p5l6aoefduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74cb661qbad77marmcdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi |
Fellow Patriot,

In my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

So why is _Republican_ Liz Cheney playing on Nancy Pelosi's team?

Not only did she vote to impeach President Trump, praise Dr. Fauci, and slander Americans like you as a "danger" to our Democracy . . .

She's taken a leading role on Pelosi's Soviet-Style January 6th Commission!

[**This kind of betrayal cannot continue, which is why I hope you'll support my America First Primary Challenge against Liz Cheney with a $35 or more campaign contribution?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znufvsk9jo80f7q7m43te7e4c8c12qcqnu4pf5u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)

My name is Harriet Hageman and, unlike Liz Cheney – who lives in Northern Virginia – Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his radical Democrats hate – they run absolutely counter to the elitist values of Cheney and her establishment backers.

Unfortunately, it's those establishment backers – including Never-Trumpers at the Lincoln Project and NeoCons like John Bolton and John Boehner – who are now going all-in to keep Cheney in power.

Case in point, just a few weeks ago, Cheney held a ritzy fundraiser with Mitt Romney where she charged $10,000 a head for VIPs . . .

_On top of the nearly $5 million in campaign cash she's amassed from a steady stream of Never-Trumpers and Democrats!_

That's right – even the billionaire cousin of Far-Left Illinois Governor JB Pritzker shelled out $20,000 for Cheney!

**My friend, with the Never-Trump arm of the establishment working night and day to keep Cheney in power, I'm going to need patriots like you to keep my campaign to defeat her going.**

[**So please, won't you give an emergency $35, $50, $75, or $100 donation to my campaign so I can go dollar for dollar with her elitist backers?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl6c8f0efa4k1vku4cdb7qhvia79bqp76emv1qv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)

It's unfortunately not hard to see why Democrats are teaming up with the establishment in taking Cheney's side.

Even before she voted to impeach President Trump on bogus charges in a sham hearing, she'd made it clear she sided with Big Government over _you_ .

Sure, she loves to go around appearing on CNN and _60 Minutes_ lecturing us about how "principled" she is, but there's nothing principled about betraying the 70% of Wyoming voters who voted for President Trump.

Nor is it "principled" to sit side-by-side with Nancy Pelosi in a Soviet-Style hearing that uses Big Government to punish conservatives as political prisoners!

My friend, there are dozens of issues Liz Cheney could be tackling instead of this sham January 6th commission.

She could be investigating Afghanistan and Joe Biden's incompetence.

She could be looking into Nancy Pelosi's spying on conservative representatives.

She could be questioning Dr. Fauci's dangerous Gain-of-Function research.

**But instead, she's scoring compliments from far-left anchors at CNN in her never-ending vendetta against President Trump and his supporters!**

[**There's no room in Wyoming, or the republican party for rabid anti-Trumpers who will sell out the constituents they represent for some positive press time from fake news stations like CNN, and I hope you'll help me.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8v4556vihej9oo5e3j25gnf8l6mvbunnqian7rg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)

As I said, loyalty and freedom still mean something here in Wyoming. While DC might be full of back-door deals and shifting political winds, the men and women of my state value the Cowboy ethos and ethic of riding for the brand.

You see, back in the old West, Cowboys gave their promise to stay loyal to the people who hired them. To the people who paid them.

They made a choice to fight for the brand as it was one of their own, to keep their word to the brand, and to never betray it.

As a DC insider, Liz Cheney knows nothing about that, but I do.

My family put down roots on a ranch outside of Laramie 1879, where we've raised cattle ever since.

Out here, we have a strong work ethic and fierce independence, and we don't take kindly to Big Government Socialists like Nancy Pelosi trying to control us.

It's why I've spent my professional life as a lawyer battling Big Government and federal agencies trying to usurp our rights, and why I'll do it in Washington, too.

I'm also:
* 100% Pro-Life
* A strong supporter of our Second Amendment
* Totally and Completely Against Vaccine Mandates
* Believe in the need to fight for our Election Integrity
* A believer in our fight for election integrity
* Committed to government transparency and ending wasteful spending!

My friend, these are the issues conservatives need to put front and center: _Not_ joining Nancy Pelosi in some anti-American tribunal designed to persecute fellow Americans!

[**So please, would you consider giving a $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 donation to my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney in the next 3 days?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7icoulcotm0lbjs7sikl84btrea4v73cm7hrv38_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)

As I told you earlier in this letter, Cheney has $5 million in campaign cash ready to bail her out in this race.

With each passing day more and more Democrats flock to her side, desperate to keep their war on President Trump and you going.

Because of that, I need your urgent financial support in the next 3 days.

Of course, if you can't quite afford to give $35 at this time, I understand

[**But know a gift of any amount lets me know you support my Trump-endorsed campaign against Cheney**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9f0mon46fhi7lqe33tj4c55shdpj6bmookjeo3o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs) **\--- and helps me crisscross the 97,914 square miles of Wyoming to talk to each and every voter in this state.**

My friend, I started by telling you how, out here in my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

And even though you may not live here, I hope these values mean something to you, too. I look forward you your response. And I want to thank you for your support.

Respectfully,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo5ek4hhddqpdbvkt98utiu2s75pg7ln8on8k3o0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: Remember – Democrat megadonors are shelling out tens of thousands for Liz Cheney. But while she has the support of Democrats and establishment career politicians like Mitt Romney, she doesn't speak for you and me.

[**Will you help me prove that by sending her packing with a $35 or more campaign donation to my primary challenge?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9qgatqc81n1vcipbimqe4oq9rvtt32qautof86o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdq79b0pm54e6tapesgvc629mmiutc3u95fcepoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)

---
| [ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1a9c2i9hqfacf1u77pjakt8fjscg74i0t1defq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj7c3h2bs)
---

| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Sure, she loves to go around appearing on CNN and 60 Minutes lecturing us about how "principled" she is, but there's nothing principled about betraying the 70% of Wyoming voters who voted for President Trump. Nor is it "principled" to sit side-by-side with Nancy Pelosi in a Soviet-Style hearing that uses Big Government to punish conservatives as political prisoners! My friend, there are dozens of issues Liz Cheney could be tackling instead of this sham January 6th commission. She could be investigating Afghanistan and Joe Biden's incompetence. She could be looking into Nancy Pelosi's spying on conservative representatives. She could be questioning Dr. Fauci's dangerous Gain-of-Function research. But instead, she's scoring compliments from far-left anchors at CNN in her never-ending vendetta against President Trump and his supporters! As I said, loyalty and freedom still mean something here in Wyoming. While DC might be full of back-door deals and shifting political winds, the men and women of my state value the Cowboy ethos and ethic of riding for the brand. You see, back in the old West, Cowboys gave their promise to stay loyal to the people who hired them. To the people who paid them. They made a choice to fight for the brand as it was one of their own, to keep their word to the brand, and to never betray it. As a DC insider, Liz Cheney knows nothing about that, but I do. My family put down roots on a ranch outside of Laramie 1879, where we've raised cattle ever since. Out here, we have a strong work ethic and fierce independence, and we don't take kindly to Big Government Socialists like Nancy Pelosi trying to control us. It's why I've spent my professional life as a lawyer battling Big Government and federal agencies trying to usurp our rights, and why I'll do it in Washington, too. I'm also: 100% Pro-Life A strong supporter of our Second Amendment Totally and Completely Against Vaccine Mandates Believe in the need to fight for our Election Integrity A believer in our fight for election integrity Committed to government transparency and ending wasteful spending! My friend, these are the issues conservatives need to put front and center: Not joining Nancy Pelosi in some anti-American tribunal designed to persecute fellow Americans! As I told you earlier in this letter, Cheney has $5 million in campaign cash ready to bail her out in this race. With each passing day more and more Democrats flock to her side, desperate to keep their war on President Trump and you going. Because of that, I need your urgent financial support in the next 3 days. Of course, if you can't quite afford to give $35 at this time, I understand \--- and helps me crisscross the 97,914 square miles of Wyoming to talk to each and every voter in this state. My friend, I started by telling you how, out here in my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something. And even though you may not live here, I hope these values mean something to you, too. I look forward you your response. And I want to thank you for your support. Respectfully, Harriet Hageman America First Conservative for Congress (WY) PS: Remember – Democrat megadonors are shelling out tens of thousands for Liz Cheney. But while she has the support of Democrats and establishment career politicians like Mitt Romney, she doesn't speak for you and me. | | Paid for by: Hageman For Wyoming P.O. Box 4157 Cheyenne, WY 82003 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

---
| Friend,

Here in New York, the number one issue right now is _crime_ \- something that should **_NOT_** come as a surprise given the lawlessness that has taken over the Empire State thanks to _radical, pro-criminal policies from the Dems in Albany!_

We have district attorneys who are refusing to enforce the law. We have prisons that are closing as a result of political calculations and left-wing pandering. We have law enforcement that isn’t being supported due to the rise of cashless bail and the radical Defund the Police agenda.

**_And we have violent criminals and serial lawbreakers who are out on our streets instead of behind bars thanks to laws that simply don’t do enough to keep us safe!_**
---
| [WE HAVE TO SAVE NY THIS YEAR! HELP THE RESCUE MISSION HERE](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zncdb8anjjopdskbhilch2el0agf5c9sq682fm2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1cjh2bs "WE HAVE TO SAVE NY THIS YEAR! HELP THE RESCUE MISSION HERE")
---
| Don’t take my word for it - **two-thirds of New Yorkers** just said they think the recent weak, tiny tweaks by our Governor Kathy Hochul to cashless bail laws won’t do **_ANYTHING_** to keep us safe. **_This from the same politician who called us her “APOSTLES” after implementing tyrannical COVID mandates that fired first responders and masked up TWO YEAR OLDS!_**

**And get this... More voters also said they would rather NOT vote for Hochul than the other way around!**

Take a look at the latest terrible polling news for Hochul here:
---

---
| _The solutions to the Crime Crisis in New York aren’t rocket science..._ Steps like FULLY repealing cashless bail would help get the job done, and I support doing just that as your next Governor.

But right now, the way that Kathy Hochul and the Dems drive is by only making **_left-hand turns._** That’s why you’re seeing their poll numbers continue to go from bad to worse, while support for _OUR_ rescue mission shows us currently within striking distance even in **_“deep-blue”_** New York!

**It’s making for a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to reclaim this state from one-party Democrat rule that we simply can’t miss.[_So can I count on you to make sure we solve the crime crisis in New York by building on these poll numbers and defeating Hochul this November?_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztcoqgd6tac2j0aa2l9bgu7f1q2uv3ps16tv85v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1cjh2bs)**

name: Kris Mauren
subject: Chinese Prisoner: "Even if they kill me, I will fight to the last day."
body:
I want to tell you about a dear friend of mine, Jimmy Lai, who was recently put in jail by the Chinese Communist Party (CCP).
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3rm7eao9bto7je9nrhg7kdb7tmj1vubpegpfoo0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj1plkmioefctn62p78p5l6cpbecth6srreodn6jir8phieoob9p33ceprcclgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666qb6phgetgmct776moefc5lclp238h1e8he4933cli6cp74s9gm8oh5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi2knk6lft5c0asigqpqtg0msj3r4f8ofdj58rd0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

Dear Friend,

I want to tell you about a dear friend of mine, Jimmy Lai, who was recently put in jail by the Chinese Communist Party (CCP).

His crime?

Advocating for the freedom of Hong Kong and its citizens.

_Jimmy Lai built a billion-dollar company. But he gave all that up to become a dissident because he believes deeply about liberty and religious freedom. He 's willing to sacrifice his life and wealth for freedom_.

Not only is he fighting for a free Hong Kong, but also is fearlessly exposing the CCP's many human rights violations.

Beijing is using its immense power and overreach to try to silence him.

The worst thing that could happen to Jimmy is if the world forgot about him.

I'm determined to make sure the world knows what's happening to my dear friend, but I need your help Friend.

The Acton Institute's mission is to promote a free and virtuous society characterized by individual liberty and sustained by religious principles. As part of that mission, the Institute proudly released the trailer for our upcoming documentary about Jimmy Lai's struggle for liberty--_**The Hong Konger**_. It's a story about the fight for freedom in Hong Kong, led by the inspiring Jimmy Lai.

[_**Can you stand with Jimmy Lai and donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to go toward our effort to tell his story? This is your chance to make sure the world knows. Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfmcg7s4ud3o2imrp05rnb60khsh86lalr73kmj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu5ldu4hk8hq741p13v0gskni78igp31uh0eiu80_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
_**Jimmy Lai personifies Hong Kong 's entrepreneurial spirit**_**.**

Jimmy fled the Maoist regime in mainland China as a 12-year-old and began a new life as a simple textile laborer in Hong Kong. Twenty-two years later, he started a fashion house, Giordano, and built it into an enormously successful retail clothing business with thousands of stores worldwide.

Then, in reaction to China's 1989 Tiananmen Square Massacre, Jimmy launched Next Media and published Hong Kong's most successful newspaper, Apple Daily, as a guardian of freedom of speech and the press.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj4upv2gfu5ch9dpmi95a91r846hqb1lmjg08rao_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

Before he turned 60, Jimmy was a billionaire. And as he thrived, so did Hong Kong.

But then the Chinese Communist Party showed up . . .

The CCP aggressively suppressed the freedom and civil liberties enjoyed for so long by the citizens of Hong Kong.

Apple Daily became the biggest critic of the CCP.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh1k8e2v739ibhf4e1r5ft4aijudkedf17tbo6r8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

Jimmy could have fled, but he chose to stay, marching alongside millions of his fellow Hong Kongers in defense of freedom and democracy.

He was soon arrested and jailed. International banks froze his assets. Apple Daily was raided and key executives were arrested. In June 2021, Apple Daily printed its final edition and shut its doors.

Jimmy risked everything. He gave up the life of a billionaire entrepreneur in Hong Kong to fight for basic human freedoms.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrt8rgrc6uj8pldid39e31uhgidi0vmubsq080o0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk26erot3d13qp5ouf9skoble726bpaj2nqkpah0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

Today Jimmy perseveres in a Hong Kong prison cell awaiting trial.

_**The Hong Konger**_ chronicles Jimmy's journey and features exclusive interviews with diplomats, citizen activists, scholars, and friends from across the globe.

_**One thing is clear: Jimmy 's fate is in our hands. His cause must not die in a prison cell--for freedom is not merely his cause, but the cause of all Hong Kongers, the Chinese people, and indeed all humanity.**_

[_**Friend, I 'm looking to raise $20,000 online this month to help us tell Jimmy Lai's story. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount you can generously spare**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp3f5cifo446pm66ust6kh8goa6eecv7c7kpou60_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)**.**

Sadly, you won't hear Jimmy Lai's story from Hollywood or the corporate media.

If you're inspired by Jimmy's story and the fight for freedom in Hong Kong, then please support this incredible documentary today. **Click any link below to support Jimmy. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmr9658ulk4u2nikoapq0ld3mf4a6g3m4d3cmufo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdi9eral19od0ij8rdtikljkvm2b9dplivnd0bpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zun3fupqog5rdj537gupdtidbu22pqchfep37r98_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z25r7drqkg8r66k33uu7bevo1v0qig0vq2td8e70_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhr4amjvociekvvl4g5gt86d22u7vsfm2b34nbbg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1omtr3n9ms5paj14ndt8b44ue79acd8ol2mmu10_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zruukacv84jooi1of6o0gav5sc4phrvdlrpc5j90_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmjqcc2is9agbp1ihatncb411burhfpksd2esuo8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh2bs)

Together we can show the world that Jimmy isn't alone in the fight for liberty.

Kris Alan Mauren
President
Acton Institute

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ksdjv2nm621qoegnfj03jc1u226uot9jrvvoeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cpie9oj1chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
May 1, 2022 | Issue XVI
---
| |
---
| | Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on The NYS Court of Appeals Ruling
Wednesday, April 27, 2022
---
The decision today from the Court of Appeals affirms our position that under One-Party Rule, Albany politicians engaged in obvious partisan gerrymandering, violating the State Constitution. Despite a clear directive from the voters of New York, Albany's ruling class decided to put their political survival ahead of the will of the people.
From the beginning, our conference has stood in support of fair, independent redistricting. Despite Democrats' attempts to inject partisan politics into this process, New Yorkers will now get what they voted for. We look forward to a special master producing fair, independent maps for the people of New York.
---
| [VIEW STATEMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q0iVp8Z9GLY74Ms0LnTdAATtSb8TjUwNRVqO4lmlA0bof-Q65ADvYMPETLQwree2eg2Lh6allR0pSjvuL9bkBgUyRZ7tMNmtjDcSHmIhdN86p8xGCkdGlqDuQvRMxp0rJZ8gEIM7oisg9oQGaY87ua6EjRjY6Z309FgqcWs4IsqiyZoPa0KgHjjDAErW5gSeefNNcyLde6_mq-7BnZZ_CzuVRA_zF0u4nicZP8KKgNC0b5J2cQpomtfiQEOk3TqODmDhPxazU70=&c=VEIMyTBbhn7OjUYe1Fs964HL9IVIrxZH4ebZnkUHI4FuKrxby55lxg==&ch=K42vh_BSCx1yVZdxPG_A-2Le8fK13Z1Lp7h4PJVrnGOKTXLZkNopzQ==)
---
|
---
| | Statement From Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Democrat Efforts to Remove Benjamin From the Ballot
Monday, April 25, 2022
---
The law isn't flawed, Kathy Hochul's judgment is -- and if the Legislature goes along with this crooked scheme, so is theirs.
For the past year Albany has been the corruption capital of the country and Democrats have sat idly by enabling this bad behavior. Now they want to go a step further, changing state law to protect their political interests.
Any Senator who supports this corrupt scheme will be held accountable by the voters of New York this November.
---
| [VIEW STATEMENT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q0iVp8Z9GLY74Ms0LnTdAATtSb8TjUwNRVqO4lmlA0bof-Q65ADvYMPETLQwree2_SZaLWaYSqDTofbMwK5mWb7m7BnZlB7VQNYCfLMXV5PIzHYTRozBO7soMpYO29Einbd7O3jeKluHxRNceqmbfy3VUpCpdMUZXCEkxfzRBwgclrDu1Fg9G5NQpZnhNyz_S1R5Cn0NowrYnCIDTr3h5OzU7bQL6zAJIs1XYVsa_aedHvUlKK0JUjZZGQldNcewm9JzsZsjA7E=&c=VEIMyTBbhn7OjUYe1Fs964HL9IVIrxZH4ebZnkUHI4FuKrxby55lxg==&ch=K42vh_BSCx1yVZdxPG_A-2Le8fK13Z1Lp7h4PJVrnGOKTXLZkNopzQ==)
---
| |
---
| | Senator Rob Ortt and Energy Stakeholders Urge Common Sense Climate Policies
---
Senate Republican Leader Ortt and Industry Professionals Call on New Yorkers to Get Involved - and Albany to Listen
---
---
On Wednesday, State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt stood with energy stakeholders to call for common sense climate policies in New York. In addition, with the deadline approaching, Senator Ortt repeated his call for New Yorkers to get involved and submit public comments on the Climate Action Council's draft scoping plan by April 30, 2022.
"The Climate Action Council has revealed their blueprint for completely altering the state's energy plan and their out of touch proposal is beyond concerning. In a rushed fashion, their plans, which are absent of any definitive cost, will eventually put an end to gas services in buildings, natural gas appliances for home heating, cooking, water heating, and clothes drying, and gasoline-automobile sales - among many other absurd policies. It's clear this scoping plan will increase the financial burden and hardship on everyday New Yorkers. Our fellow residents are experiencing an energy affordability crisis, surging inflation, rising home heating and electric bills, and severe pain at the pump. Now is not the time to completely rid the state of this dependable energy source," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
---
| [READ FULL RELEASE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q0iVp8Z9GLY74Ms0LnTdAATtSb8TjUwNRVqO4lmlA0bof-Q65ADvYMPETLQwree25c8dvLVlD3rjL6L4HeXWvYUbtMnc_s28apWFN9vfNt4ev6H65CshtPc4dB6_ttbpT3CUNwYNipezwXkxdNqWjj4S-rC9g_pRag36yw-gv3s0UznnCFukZ3qvlC-qIb2w3ci-nx4RDzFVqgRJqPMP9lqSKdRtJBoSZx2r6SE_otQtDywazs4Xauq3cL0AYxt0&c=VEIMyTBbhn7OjUYe1Fs964HL9IVIrxZH4ebZnkUHI4FuKrxby55lxg==&ch=K42vh_BSCx1yVZdxPG_A-2Le8fK13Z1Lp7h4PJVrnGOKTXLZkNopzQ==)
---
| Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt Applauds Gas Tax Reprieve Passed by Niagara County Legislature
---
Niagara County Legislature caps the sales tax on gas at $3.00 per gallon
---
---
On Monday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt expressed his support for the Gas Tax Sales Reprieve enacted by the Niagara County Legislature, capping the county sales tax on gas at $3.00 per gallon. The Niagara County gas sales tax reprieve coincides with the 16 cent reduction in state gas taxes included in the State Budget, providing additional relief to motorists.
"A reduction in gas sales tax has been an issue that myself and my colleagues in the NYS Republican Conference have been advocating for [since last year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q0iVp8Z9GLY74Ms0LnTdAATtSb8TjUwNRVqO4lmlA0bof-Q65ADvYMPETLQwree2aM0pdqSDVFFaerB-ghzxtKi5d5-Xn3-atGelqpxO5gTSBViSLsh4FVfCy7PaFcA02YCNmc6x7N5c3OCk4WtHadgbyTfZl2i0VIxZo30cmhRxQUyp63kI-7iOYbii7pbc-CUWv15QHOYI8PG2QytlhWuiLRkNFpDnfX2AtDmchf7LCCm0QET37wi66CXir3pz&c=VEIMyTBbhn7OjUYe1Fs964HL9IVIrxZH4ebZnkUHI4FuKrxby55lxg==&ch=K42vh_BSCx1yVZdxPG_A-2Le8fK13Z1Lp7h4PJVrnGOKTXLZkNopzQ==). I applaud the Niagara County Legislature's decision today in capping the county's gas sales tax. Now, residents will have the state reduction as well as the County tax cap to keep in their wallets. This is a step in the right direction, and my colleagues and I will continue to fight in Albany for more tax relief throughout the rest of this year's legislative session," said Leader Ortt.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q0iVp8Z9GLY74Ms0LnTdAATtSb8TjUwNRVqO4lmlA0bof-Q65ADvYMPETLQwree2bztAuKlvp2YzptzU6Bt8rONjWAbXIfnNwvs93E2ATnwacvIFHKx_d8A9cjkorrYThUeC3Nuv33q4k5cj2OOaMSAkSIM9ysRmtArdVCVD7thLNKmZD-sXbjAR18KCkmBAhTR35kx4wtTBPU2z70fDnfh-NeWKQqW_g8EH0e76wDMJXGPiOqDwJrgu4HkqiEOGWdpurJaNK9QyLIxwGvzIwNxmDB9oGnxy&c=VEIMyTBbhn7OjUYe1Fs964HL9IVIrxZH4ebZnkUHI4FuKrxby55lxg==&ch=K42vh_BSCx1yVZdxPG_A-2Le8fK13Z1Lp7h4PJVrnGOKTXLZkNopzQ==)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: DISGUSTING: “Shucking and jiving for their white handlers.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
_**" I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**
--Eli Mystal, MSNBC_

Peter,

I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in _The Nation_.

The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line:

_" Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."_
Well, Peter, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings.

He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said:

_" I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." _
**That's racist, disgusting, and sad.**

I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far.

**You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment.**

We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. **[Can I count on you to help me today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275499:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r)**

_Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air._

**I won't be quiet about this.** This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275499:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275499:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275499:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275500:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275501:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275502:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275503:J4qQwHoN2:m:1:3317145305:23183B5192DBE969CFDEC72BE992A4E4:r)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4ske39onmv0l40ng7690d0hfaat0la6lc0e00a0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uap3ad5kmjh34d5nc9gebdr2m6pmedhn65onco5h6hg65cr0cso7fdtgsdh3bc77q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmipm4ptmc9j3cp5jckrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5chgm0oj0shjm49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcmg8c3rfclku4lv2trgqk55om6f6uq6iute646g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g64o74cth2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq145jq6a4a8j3i1uq14hh4aheolbec5g63q02a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g64o74cth2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn8cl4qghdmt3keajo7stkqf039s69u7ilc4q0l0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g64o74cth2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Pelosi’s favorite republican: Liz Cheney
body:
Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9990%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=mmEbMV%2bOtcSLBPwlKVHI3A&sysid=1)
Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi |
Fellow Patriot,

In my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

So why is _Republican_ Liz Cheney playing on Nancy Pelosi's team?

Not only did she vote to impeach President Trump, praise Dr. Fauci, and slander Americans like you as a "danger" to our Democracy . . .

She's taken a leading role on Pelosi's Soviet-Style January 6th Commission!

[**This kind of betrayal cannot continue, which is why I hope you'll support my America First Primary Challenge against Liz Cheney with a $35 or more campaign contribution?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sNHo01CJrYlB6Kg04D1V9w&sysid=1)

My name is Harriet Hageman and, unlike Liz Cheney - who lives in Northern Virginia - Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his radical Democrats hate - they run absolutely counter to the elitist values of Cheney and her establishment backers.

Unfortunately, it's those establishment backers - including Never-Trumpers at the Lincoln Project and NeoCons like John Bolton and John Boehner - who are now going all-in to keep Cheney in power.

Case in point, just a few weeks ago, Cheney held a ritzy fundraiser with Mitt Romney where she charged $10,000 a head for VIPs . . .

_On top of the nearly $5 million in campaign cash she's amassed from a steady stream of Never-Trumpers and Democrats!_

That's right - even the billionaire cousin of Far-Left Illinois Governor JB Pritzker shelled out $20,000 for Cheney!

**My friend, with the Never-Trump arm of the establishment working night and day to keep Cheney in power, I'm going to need patriots like you to keep my campaign to defeat her going.**

[**So please, won't you give an emergency $35, $50, $75, or $100 donation to my campaign so I can go dollar for dollar with her elitist backers?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZJmOkrbJI1lXvnjxmYl5DQ&sysid=1)

It's unfortunately not hard to see why Democrats are teaming up with the establishment in taking Cheney's side.

Even before she voted to impeach President Trump on bogus charges in a sham hearing, she'd made it clear she sided with Big Government over _you_.

Sure, she loves to go around appearing on CNN and _60 Minutes_ lecturing us about how "principled" she is, but there's nothing principled about betraying the 70% of Wyoming voters who voted for President Trump.

Nor is it "principled" to sit side-by-side with Nancy Pelosi in a Soviet-Style hearing that uses Big Government to punish conservatives as political prisoners!

My friend, there are dozens of issues Liz Cheney could be tackling instead of this sham January 6th commission.

She could be investigating Afghanistan and Joe Biden's incompetence.

She could be looking into Nancy Pelosi's spying on conservative representatives.

She could be questioning Dr. Fauci's dangerous Gain-of-Function research.

**But instead, she's scoring compliments from far-left anchors at CNN in her never-ending vendetta against President Trump and his supporters!**

[**There's no room in Wyoming, or the republican party for rabid anti-Trumpers who will sell out the constituents they represent for some positive press time from fake news stations like CNN, and I hope you'll help me.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cvX7BtIrxh9xDiP4N2MI0A&sysid=1)

As I said, loyalty and freedom still mean something here in Wyoming. While DC might be full of back-door deals and shifting political winds, the men and women of my state value the Cowboy ethos and ethic of riding for the brand.

You see, back in the old West, Cowboys gave their promise to stay loyal to the people who hired them. To the people who paid them.

They made a choice to fight for the brand as it was one of their own, to keep their word to the brand, and to never betray it.

As a DC insider, Liz Cheney knows nothing about that, but I do.

My family put down roots on a ranch outside of Laramie 1879, where we've raised cattle ever since.

Out here, we have a strong work ethic and fierce independence, and we don't take kindly to Big Government Socialists like Nancy Pelosi trying to control us.

It's why I've spent my professional life as a lawyer battling Big Government and federal agencies trying to usurp our rights, and why I'll do it in Washington, too.

I'm also:
* 100% Pro-Life
* A strong supporter of our Second Amendment
* Totally and Completely Against Vaccine Mandates
* Believe in the need to fight for our Election Integrity
* A believer in our fight for election integrity
* Committed to government transparency and ending wasteful spending!

My friend, these are the issues conservatives need to put front and center: _Not_ joining Nancy Pelosi in some anti-American tribunal designed to persecute fellow Americans!

[**So please, would you consider giving a $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 donation to my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney in the next 3 days?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20079%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wru7W6q03wgjokIHc%2bG4MA&sysid=1)

As I told you earlier in this letter, Cheney has $5 million in campaign cash ready to bail her out in this race.

With each passing day more and more Democrats flock to her side, desperate to keep their war on President Trump and you going.

Because of that, I need your urgent financial support in the next 3 days.

Of course, if you can't quite afford to give $35 at this time, I understand

[**But know a gift of any amount lets me know you support my Trump-endorsed campaign against Cheney**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20070%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ftcVAok4GHOzrNbBbtIsmA&sysid=1) **\--- and helps me crisscross the 97,914 square miles of Wyoming to talk to each and every voter in this state.**

My friend, I started by telling you how, out here in my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

And even though you may not live here, I hope these values mean something to you, too. I look forward you your response. And I want to thank you for your support.

Respectfully,
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20071%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fo7fD%2bhkIywpUIxujs6B9A&sysid=1)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: Remember - Democrat megadonors are shelling out tens of thousands for Liz Cheney. But while she has the support of Democrats and establishment career politicians like Mitt Romney, she doesn't speak for you and me.

[**Will you help me prove that by sending her packing with a $35 or more campaign donation to my primary challenge?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20072%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EAdfHEZk346Fxvo0tVC9lA&sysid=1)

clean_body: Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi | Fellow Patriot, In my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something. So why is Republican Liz Cheney playing on Nancy Pelosi's team? Not only did she vote to impeach President Trump, praise Dr. Fauci, and slander Americans like you as a "danger" to our Democracy . . . She's taken a leading role on Pelosi's Soviet-Style January 6th Commission! My name is Harriet Hageman and, unlike Liz Cheney - who lives in Northern Virginia - Wyoming is my home. Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age. They're not just values Joe Biden and his radical Democrats hate - they run absolutely counter to the elitist values of Cheney and her establishment backers. Unfortunately, it's those establishment backers - including Never-Trumpers at the Lincoln Project and NeoCons like John Bolton and John Boehner - who are now going all-in to keep Cheney in power. Case in point, just a few weeks ago, Cheney held a ritzy fundraiser with Mitt Romney where she charged $10,000 a head for VIPs . . . On top of the nearly $5 million in campaign cash she's amassed from a steady stream of Never-Trumpers and Democrats! That's right - even the billionaire cousin of Far-Left Illinois Governor JB Pritzker shelled out $20,000 for Cheney! My friend, with the Never-Trump arm of the establishment working night and day to keep Cheney in power, I'm going to need patriots like you to keep my campaign to defeat her going. It's unfortunately not hard to see why Democrats are teaming up with the establishment in taking Cheney's side. Even before she voted to impeach President Trump on bogus charges in a sham hearing, she'd made it clear she sided with Big Government over you. Sure, she loves to go around appearing on CNN and 60 Minutes lecturing us about how "principled" she is, but there's nothing principled about betraying the 70% of Wyoming voters who voted for President Trump. Nor is it "principled" to sit side-by-side with Nancy Pelosi in a Soviet-Style hearing that uses Big Government to punish conservatives as political prisoners! My friend, there are dozens of issues Liz Cheney could be tackling instead of this sham January 6th commission. She could be investigating Afghanistan and Joe Biden's incompetence. She could be looking into Nancy Pelosi's spying on conservative representatives. She could be questioning Dr. Fauci's dangerous Gain-of-Function research. But instead, she's scoring compliments from far-left anchors at CNN in her never-ending vendetta against President Trump and his supporters! As I said, loyalty and freedom still mean something here in Wyoming. While DC might be full of back-door deals and shifting political winds, the men and women of my state value the Cowboy ethos and ethic of riding for the brand. You see, back in the old West, Cowboys gave their promise to stay loyal to the people who hired them. To the people who paid them. They made a choice to fight for the brand as it was one of their own, to keep their word to the brand, and to never betray it. As a DC insider, Liz Cheney knows nothing about that, but I do. My family put down roots on a ranch outside of Laramie 1879, where we've raised cattle ever since. Out here, we have a strong work ethic and fierce independence, and we don't take kindly to Big Government Socialists like Nancy Pelosi trying to control us. It's why I've spent my professional life as a lawyer battling Big Government and federal agencies trying to usurp our rights, and why I'll do it in Washington, too. I'm also: 100% Pro-Life A strong supporter of our Second Amendment Totally and Completely Against Vaccine Mandates Believe in the need to fight for our Election Integrity A believer in our fight for election integrity Committed to government transparency and ending wasteful spending! My friend, these are the issues conservatives need to put front and center: Not joining Nancy Pelosi in some anti-American tribunal designed to persecute fellow Americans! As I told you earlier in this letter, Cheney has $5 million in campaign cash ready to bail her out in this race. With each passing day more and more Democrats flock to her side, desperate to keep their war on President Trump and you going. Because of that, I need your urgent financial support in the next 3 days. Of course, if you can't quite afford to give $35 at this time, I understand \--- and helps me crisscross the 97,914 square miles of Wyoming to talk to each and every voter in this state. My friend, I started by telling you how, out here in my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something. And even though you may not live here, I hope these values mean something to you, too. I look forward you your response. And I want to thank you for your support. Respectfully, Harriet Hageman America First Conservative for Congress (WY) PS: Remember - Democrat megadonors are shelling out tens of thousands for Liz Cheney. But while she has the support of Democrats and establishment career politicians like Mitt Romney, she doesn't speak for you and me. | | Paid for by: Hageman For Wyoming P.O. Box 4157 Cheyenne, WY 82003 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: What I had to say on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
Hardworking families deserve a senator who’s going to fight to protect our democracy
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44786385/343094214/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNmZTJmZC00NmM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QlirDtQ7uXjtLLkgJdlkmP1rERviniNB9PN3aDjbbgM=)
---
I joined "The Last Word With Lawrence O'Donnell" on MSNBC, where I discussed how, after national Republicans tried and failed twice to kick me off the ballot, I'm more determined than ever to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa. This win is so crucial for expanding Democratic Senate control – but it's also about standing up for our democracy. You see, Republicans have taken to attacking our election process from multiple vantage points – which is an attack on the very foundation of our democracy. In Iowa, they tried to kick me off the ballot. Across the country, they've passed voter suppression laws. In the U.S. Senate, so-called leaders like Chuck Grassley defend the former president's attempts to use his DOJ to overturn the 2020 election results.
Hardworking families deserve a senator who’s going to fight to protect our democracy – not spread baseless conspiracy theories and double down on their defense of Trump, like Sen. Grassley. It's no surprise that _only 27%_ of Iowans want to reelect him for an eighth term in the U.S. Senate.
**Iowa is ready for and deserves new leadership – and I have every intention of defeating Sen. Grassley. But with Washington Republicans sitting on a record-breaking war chest of more than $44 million, I simply cannot win without your grassroots support.[Can you pitch in $5 – whatever you can spare to flip Iowa blue – before midnight tonight to defend our Democratic Senate majority and protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44786386/343094215/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk977-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjNmZTJmZC00NmM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QlirDtQ7uXjtLLkgJdlkmP1rERviniNB9PN3aDjbbgM=)**

name: Darryle Torbert via Shontel Brown for Congress
subject: Early voting is almost over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Help us get out the vote!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44786641/343095031/918102368?refcode=EM_FR_220501FinalPush1_N_DT_ALL_7_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJhNTM2My00OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNnAdXayOgzF-GET7oiGvAibT5qw7qLgGh5JmpIjlks=) Peter,

Today, Sunday, May 1, marks **the only day of Sunday early voting for this primary,** and we’re doing everything we can to get out the vote. As our window to connect with voters continues to narrow, we need your help to put things into high gear.

Turning out the vote means that we have to meet voters where they are, but to do that, we need all hands on deck. The last days of early voting are upon us, and to win big, we must give this moment our all.

**As we head into our final push before election day, we need to reach $5,000 to help boost our efforts and secure victory for Shontel.** Keeping volunteers on the ground and resources on hand to distribute our message is key, but we can’t do it without your help.

name: Lawrence Reed
subject: Shocking news about school teachers
body:
The Covid pandemic placed education under a microscope, and many parents don’t like what they’ve seen. Here are just a few
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagt8legvis9eeomgrpf5kl1m719f5ok7526d6bg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbl65p79p3mc4omeo9ic1g6fdbl6pom4cb3mho78o3icpqrecb568q68or5e4rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p32phlcspm6pti6hj32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8rem41h0r7adebgole0mjf6tqbo79611p1jp1bo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)

Hello Friend,

The Covid pandemic placed education under a microscope, and many parents don't like what they've seen.

Here are just a few examples of the problems in schools:
* Teachers are pushing socialism in the classroom.
* Teachers are fighting to remove standardized testing.
* School districts are starting to remove reading, writing, and math proficiency requirements for high school graduates.
* Teachers are giving lessons in protesting to kindergarteners.

My name is Lawrence Reed and I am the President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE).

FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society.

We're not politicians. We're a major non-profit that is educating the next generation about free markets and liberty - something that Congress can never do.

FEE works to reach the next generation in the classroom, online, and by supporting teachers.

[_**Friend**_ _**, good education is vital for the future of America, and I am asking you to stand with me and fight for our children. Can you generously donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount? Click here to donate today >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhjlo302dciop1a55lncv89k7epqfeottsch7kuo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)

**Let me go into more detail about how FEE works to provide education on individual liberty, free-market economics, entrepreneurship, private property, high moral character, and limited government.**

One way we do this is _**FEE in the Classroom**_**.

FEE in the Classroom's** one-of-a-kind educational workshops uniquely engage, inspire, and equip high school and college students with a deeper understanding of the principles of free enterprise, limited government, and entrepreneurship directly in their brick-and-mortar schools and through their virtual classes.

Over 87% of these seminars are held in high schools, 65%+ of which are public schools.

In a single day, 75-300 students engage with FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors through compelling lectures, exciting economic experiments, engaging group discussions, and Q&As on how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and state of the nation.

FEE in the Classroom workshops often serve as the first introduction for tens of thousands of young Americans to the ideas of a free society.

[_**Please consider sending an urgent donation of $10 or more to teach high school students about free markets >>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqoefbcdoq7k0iqhsi5qkkllpb62qjf73100ni8g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)

FEE also reaches Gen Z online. Last year alone, our videos received **11 MILLION views** and **over 1.8 MILLION shares.**

We also reached Gen Z OVER 83 MILLION times last year.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi0kid36cnmvfgf6cfo3ccap6v3v8e9l9uubbfvo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)

We were founded in 1946, to revive the spirit of liberty in the American people.

**I am asking for your immediate support to help FEE change thousands of lives and fight socialism, woke ideology, indoctrination, and anti-America education.**

But the fight isn't over yet, and I am personally asking for your help to take back the classroom.

**Friend, I am looking to raise $26,000 online before next month to expand our programs to millions of more students.**

Please select an amount below to rush your support today.

[_**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zagns5sohutmqn2s0rds8a5277gqq4rsel4bhpp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuk5ofvtniiblkhd6edpp8t8b4a8dl1sarrvsit8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdbh0meri5tfria3upphhhdoik0htt1dp4bjusrg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmmg00qehh3js45nhj1bne9vaou6pk85v91j27u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqga0dji2osm9n1mh94sl9ll0pnrbc26rbr30f8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqmfcbsjinp9jf7feebu2n0i0sl3cb86cjq3fblg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbuf07r8ttfvsgf05jg8dk0hupp8omenfin4jgco_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpmaok8jkucu0k41id70loauun81u9ra7vc1cmbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5g66ob1cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Lawrence Reed
President Emeritus

We have incredible news: **Lieutenant Colonel Alexander Vindman just endorsed Admiral Mike Franken to help him defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue!**
You probably know Lt. Col. name: DASS
subject: Thank you, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team: thanks to generous supporters like you, we were able to hit last night’s critical end of month goal!
We just wanted to say thank you – and to let you know how we will use this momentum to build a stronger democracy.
DASS is dedicated to protecting voting rights, expanding ballot access to all eligible Americans, and electing Democratic Secretaries of State who will stand up for our most fundamental rights.
But your input is crucial to informing how to direct these resources, and how we can make the most difference in your communities and nation-wide.
Team, can you take just a few minutes to fill out our voting rights priorities survey and help us plan for the lead-up to November? We need to hear from you! >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/surv-voter-suppression]
Take the survey! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/surv-voter-suppression]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

name: Team ODP
subject: It’s GOTV time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need your help before the Ohio primary.
| Hey! Team ODP here,

We've got volunteers all across the state working hard to make sure that folks are ready for the primary election, **which is this Tuesday!**

**[We have just a few days left to make sure we talk to every voter and make sure they know what’s at stake in this election. That’s why we set a $20,000 GOTV goal – and we need your help to hit it. Will you donate today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44793249/343123227/1738144309?refcode=em22_220501_gotv1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220501_gotv1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdlNWYwZS01N2M5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiisoZ37pQOrC9uyz1-lgG53d1Y5WTvzcC3AGrysvK0=)**

After Tuesday, we will finally know which far-right candidate will be going up against Tim Ryan. With Josh Mandel and Trump-endorsed J.D. Vance running neck and neck, we know that both are significant risks to our Democracy, and we can't afford to let either one of them make it to the Senate.

Soon, the winner of the Republican primary will be spending big against us as we continue to prepare for November. This already tight race will get even closer as control of the Senate will come down to Ohio.

**[Will you chip in to our GOTV fund so that we can keep up the momentum until the primary?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44793250/343123228/1738144309?refcode=em22_220501_gotv1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220501_gotv1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdlNWYwZS01N2M5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiisoZ37pQOrC9uyz1-lgG53d1Y5WTvzcC3AGrysvK0=)**

Whatever the outcome of the Senate primary, we can't slow down in our fight to protect our blue majority.

**[We don't rely on dark-money donors; we rely only on support from this grassroots team. Please consider making a donation today ahead of the primary on Tuesday>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44793251/343123229/1738144309?refcode=em22_220501_gotv1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220501_gotv1_fndd_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdlNWYwZS01N2M5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiisoZ37pQOrC9uyz1-lgG53d1Y5WTvzcC3AGrysvK0=)**

Thank you,

Team ODP

P.S. **[If you haven’t already voted, take a minute to double-check your voter registration and find your polling location.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44793252/343123230/-436542035?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdlNWYwZS01N2M5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fiisoZ37pQOrC9uyz1-lgG53d1Y5WTvzcC3AGrysvK0=&emci=32fc3789-04c8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3d7e5f0e-57c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25291327)**

body:
President Trump is all in. Are you?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3u14or6r7cus76hue3nrp9forguvjf7taou3at8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn1p326por0thim3inbd5j69on9d5im5gb8oj2map36c9me9ir2tb2mepmecln6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666qb6oj0epimcdb76moefc5lclp238h1e8he4933cli62p35c5gm8oh5u)
****
President Trump is all in. Are you?
Friend -- this is Jim Jordan. We just heard from President Trump. [**I need you to see it for yourself, then I 'm going to ask you for an urgent contribution to put his plan into action.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z26b7u4vks1a7tek2np8dg44eg1m3satp6fngk78_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5i6aob1chh2bs)
_**" I think we can win A LOT of seats in the House and I think we can take back the Senate." \-- President Donald J. Trump **_
He is all in. President Trump thinks we have what it takes to win back control of Congress -- now we are pleading for your help to see it through.
Our critical End-of-Month deadline is officially here. This is the first test of our strength and dedication since President Trump's declaration.**I intend to do everything I can to help him before the deadline. Will you?**
_President Trump asked for your help. So did Donald Trump Jr., Newt Gingrich, two Senators, and three Members of Congress. Now I 'm asking you too._
