name: Mary Trump
subject: Democracy is on the line. Will you step up, Derek?
body:
Derek,
On Jan. 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it – but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and CommonGood, Derek? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220428_CGVA_DDF&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF]
You know my uncle, Derek. He started the “Big Lie,” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund – and it’s why CommonGood and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like CommonGood.
This includes an all-out effort to hold the House and save the Senate but also TO SUPPORT campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, Derek. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part – starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and CommonGood today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_ddf?refcode=20220501_CGVA_DDF]
Thank you,
Dr. Mary L. Trump
Founder & Chair
Democracy Defense Fund
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

name: Patriot Values Defense
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyFkE9vgzAMxT8N3EDE_CsHDpW6XiamnrZjZBLTRiIBJaH7-jNtt-ukKLL9i1-enu5H6KpRjKnpoQAo6kKI_WpzMWnEBgS2tR4npZKqwJl8zFeM3izxjvNGQdNELlCuFpveegBqmw4PE9adqMq2Etg1oPQIbUUoDunXIAc0s3HXD7TUr3ctfZAO5c3Mc6YWJwoh60xkABLSub_FuIakPCZw5hNIbZ50vj8Omt3kpDee__Vcs0aIJm7RLC5jtUzf9b5dnrdoZVg2rygpT6tfwkoqspMEmh1Z0mazjMiyw9dQoV3RXB2Pn-Yeak-0uEguMrkcs8vnKfvN78Uj-V1t5DYoLoZ3xm8DpL7X6zc7NqFpOdTr_t0jv_hPHj-rQYrq) Dear Fellow American, [](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyFkE9vgzAMxT8N3EDE_CsHDpW6XiamnrZjZBLTRiIBJaH7-jNtt-ukKLL9i1-enu5H6KpRjKnpoQAo6kKI_WpzMWnEBgS2tR4npZKqwJl8zFeM3izxjvNGQdNELlCuFpveegBqmw4PE9adqMq2Etg1oPQIbUUoDunXIAc0s3HXD7TUr3ctfZAO5c3Mc6YWJwoh60xkABLSub_FuIakPCZw5hNIbZ50vj8Omt3kpDee__Vcs0aIJm7RLC5jtUzf9b5dnrdoZVg2rygpT6tfwkoqspMEmh1Z0mazjMiyw9dQoV3RXB2Pn-Yeak-0uEguMrkcs8vnKfvN78Uj-V1t5DYoLoZ3xm8DpL7X6zc7NqFpOdTr_t0jv_hPHj-rQYrq) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyFkE9vgzAMxT8N3EDE_CsHDpW6XiamnrZjZBLTRiIBJaH7-jNtt-ukKLL9i1-enu5H6KpRjKnpoQAo6kKI_WpzMWnEBgS2tR4npZKqwJl8zFeM3izxjvNGQdNELlCuFpveegBqmw4PE9adqMq2Etg1oPQIbUUoDunXIAc0s3HXD7TUr3ctfZAO5c3Mc6YWJwoh60xkABLSub_FuIakPCZw5hNIbZ50vj8Omt3kpDee__Vcs0aIJm7RLC5jtUzf9b5dnrdoZVg2rygpT6tfwkoqspMEmh1Z0mazjMiyw9dQoV3RXB2Pn-Yeak-0uEguMrkcs8vnKfvN78Uj-V1t5DYoLoZ3xm8DpL7X6zc7NqFpOdTr_t0jv_hPHj-rQYrq) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

subject: The Ron DeSantis Round Up
body:
Check out what the campaign has been up to this week.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=27547770bf9c22146dfba3c72e0c39bfaebf76464f9c0f7a928228e3e4092bc0bafd8e97676078475bd77723a3507a44f3d72c8b871cb8df6dbc96e5e7f6fa1df1ccbded04b8e0179f21244937854d1d)
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bcc5d476c7c517cdf96c7f89a5751a32c32a0ae375034324dfa8ccaefbeece10a53e6fcdd83e95c63036b263c2b1f27e7f881253d2dce76c6b)
---

**Welcome to the Ron DeSantis Round Up where we help you stay up-to-date with America's favorite Governor!**
We are overjoyed to share this news with you: On Friday, our amazing First Lady Casey DeSantis completed her final radiation treatment. We can't thank you enough for all your prayers for the First Lady as she battled breast cancer.

The Governor and First Lady have felt an outpouring of support since the beginning of this daunting journey and are so grateful. _**_["We really appreciate everybody who has prayed for her and for us over these many, many months." \- Governor DeSantis](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bcc1a3076cef12f3af2dcbe827ab43b702585aa4c45907abd907ffee13d0202d29a3aa4d9c7c624dc3a33cddda99219a91a773f9481c382f28 ""We really appreciate everybody who has prayed for her and for us over these many, many months." - Governor DeSantis")_**_
---
|
---
Governor DeSantis joined Laura Ingraham on Fox News Thursday night for the "Florida and the American Comeback Town Hall" in Orlando.

During the hour-long program, Governor DeSantis was joined by Florida parents, law enforcement, and other special guests to discuss how his leadership is keeping Florida free.
**WATCH CLIPS FROM THE TOWN HALL:**
** ** **Clip:_[If you actually looked at the data.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bcba53d0e6b4d86b5d8d194111f7a021ef1a3f2be6cd72007deb0203e4086c1270954801a14a8b2f7bf2c3d8d0ee555462c3dad931207f43a4 "If you actually looked at the data.")_

Clip: _[Governor DeSantis believe in education, not indoctrination.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bcb012760f11048eb5e2abca5b06e2eb84a39248bd03701758f243314ff61530c470c13180b83d8192ff83fdc0ce42655dea9ba8fb61743367 "Governor DeSantis believe in education, not indoctrination.")_

Clip: _[Former NYPD: Listen to DeSantis, move to Florida.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bc6433e0eeabf394509385059d854591ca91a18bf98e0129214a221a8e27c33bfe1ab24d7bfd94034305057108e13e814f004eaae22db0ee20 "Former NYPD: Listen to DeSantis, move to Florida.")_**

---
|
---

Governor DeSantis further protected Florida elections this week by **[signing legislation to ensure election integrity](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bc595aa2468ef540c8dfed72c9867a1866f57a56bfc4e9411b77b2f0ed8e0e3619231e6d9e2f995545b3474f2a18a6028375b73cc19282d982).**

By increasing the penalty for ballot harvesting, strengthening voter ID requirements for mail-in ballots, and expanding the state's ban on "Zuckerbucks," Governor DeSantis is ensuring that **_every_ Floridian's voice is heard at the ballot box**.

---
|
---

Do you believe that parents know best, back the blue, want Dr. Fauci to pound sand, value freedom and liberty, and **love Governor Ron DeSantis**?

**_[Show your neighbors that you stand for FREEDOM and secure your"In This House" yard sign now! ⬇️](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bc99d5ae604874c5d1644eefea0d1321b04827f1c0a1571f9737d480dc48f0f45bf6c8aa72bf42d24d4117ee7cbb6f1bd8f9e3604e3881c00f "Show your neighbors that you stand for FREEDOM and secure your “In This House” yard sign now! ⬇️")_**

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bc8efa6212731e22c5b03e2cc165a12041d53de57fb034a3a5bff1314eba9df46656b5d55e06e83887f01ddfc2ffb0d90ebee7d99df42481a1)
---

---
|

Join Team DeSantis and get involved in the movement that is fighting to ensure a free Florida for generations to come!

Become a member of the DeSantis Freedom Team -- help recruit new supporters to the campaign and get rewarded in the process.

Rewards range from t-shirts to an invitation to an event and a photo with Governor DeSantis and the First Lady! _**[Don't wait-- Join the DeSantis Freedom Team TODAY!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b7d10f6e538c17bc07abc2a89062239a72a2e27432f5557dfd457233b95e9edb88fae76d36971a7cbc68c24bc2bb43cfb8a6bda45c27e9c739762e98002c478e "Don't wait - join the DeSantis Freedom Team TODAY!")**_
Thank you for being a strong supporter of our movement to keep Florida FREE. **We couldn't do it without you.**

🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩🟩⬛

Dan Crenshaw

Peter -

**It 's Dan Crenshaw, Republican from Texas.**

It's nearly the end of the month, and our fundraising reports are almost due! I won't lie, we're pretty nervous. **Pelosi 's House Democrats** keep beating us MONTH after MONTH and _**we are sweating in anticipation of April 's results. **_

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I need you with me in the fight to uphold Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, we need to talk about Roe v. Wade.
Oklahoma's ultraconservative governor just signed a near-total abortion ban into law, which comes on the heels of similar bans in Texas and Mississippi. **The right to choose is under relentless attack, and this onslaught from extremist GOP lawmakers won't stop until Roe v. Wade is overturned once and for all.**
This June, the Supreme Court's conservative majority of GOP-appointed justices is expected to do just that — to strike down Roe v. Wade despite decades of precedent. If they do, tens of millions of people will lose their most basic right to make decisions about their own bodies.
**Time _isn't_ on our side. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 members of this team to speak out by answering my emergency live poll before it closes at midnight tonight. Please, tell me now:**
**Should the Supreme Court uphold Roe v. Wade and protect reproductive freedom?**

clean_body: | | | Friend, we need to talk about Roe v. Wade. Oklahoma's ultraconservative governor just signed a near-total abortion ban into law, which comes on the heels of similar bans in Texas and Mississippi. The right to choose is under relentless attack, and this onslaught from extremist GOP lawmakers won't stop until Roe v. Wade is overturned once and for all. This June, the Supreme Court's conservative majority of GOP-appointed justices is expected to do just that — to strike down Roe v. Wade despite decades of precedent. If they do, tens of millions of people will lose their most basic right to make decisions about their own bodies. Time isn't on our side. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 members of this team to speak out by answering my emergency live poll before it closes at midnight tonight. Please, tell me now: Should the Supreme Court uphold Roe v. Wade and protect reproductive freedom? | | | | With all of us raising our voices together, we'll be too loud to ignore. Thank you for adding yours today. Kirsten | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . GILLIBRAND FOR SENATE 126 C Street NW 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20001 United States © 2022 | Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate. |

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Closer than ever
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44797699/343142613/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGNkYTlmYy02MGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2yrk-jcecMRz880JCztQUGHZgkQtwu_89kdaA54cvU8=)

Folks,

We've made it to the final stretch of the primary in the most competitive Senate race in the country, and I couldn't be more grateful for your support and all you've done to help us get here.

When we needed it most, you stepped up and helped us not just reach but _exceed_ our critical end-of-month fundraising targets month after month. Your hard-earned dollars keep our ads on the air and strengthen our grassroots ground game, putting us where we are today.

**For that, I just want to say _thank you_. Your support means the world to me as we continue to strengthen our grassroots coalition for working families.**

Now, we're closer than ever to hearing directly from Pennsylvanians on their choice for the November election, and I have a pretty good guess at what some of my opponents will be doing to win: Courting big donors and corporate PACs to keep their ads on air.

**But that's not me, and that's not how we win this race.** We're going door to door, the traditional way, the _right_ way. From train stations to retirement homes to union halls and coffee shops, we're meeting Pennsylvanians where they are and focusing on what really matters: building a better future for their families.

What counts in this race is having the respect to show up for the people, and my mission is to show up for the people of Pennsylvania and working families around the country who want real progress for them, their families, their children, and their communities.

In the Senate, I will be your advocate to protect our democracy, fight for workers, and make real progress for working families and everyone who has been left behind. **As long as I have your continued support, I know we'll achieve these important goals and so much more.**

Now, let's keep our foot on the pedal and win this together.

Thanks again,

Conor Lamb [MAKE A WEEKLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44797700/343142614/-863248123?refcode=em22_220501_eomty&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGNkYTlmYy02MGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2yrk-jcecMRz880JCztQUGHZgkQtwu_89kdaA54cvU8=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44797701/343142615/-863248123?refcode=em22_220501_eomty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGNkYTlmYy02MGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2yrk-jcecMRz880JCztQUGHZgkQtwu_89kdaA54cvU8=)

* * *

body:
Missed goals mean missed opportunities to expand the electorate

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44797921/343143607/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220501VR1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYzI5M2QwLTYxYzktZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qIY56bc0ZwimBo7usKhc82HWuG_S0WYLX7hSpSWuSW0=)
| Fellow activist, we have some bad news.

We came up short on fundraising for our voter registration fund. That means missing opportunities to expand the electorate in time for the May primary.

But it’s not too late yet. If we can start May off on a good note, we can get ahead on not only our fundraising goal for the month but also our goal of registering 50,000 new voters in 2022.

**[Fellow activist, can you rush a donation of $25 to help us register voters to expand the electorate in Pennsylvania? We’re nearly out of time.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44797922/343143608/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220501VR1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYzI5M2QwLTYxYzktZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qIY56bc0ZwimBo7usKhc82HWuG_S0WYLX7hSpSWuSW0=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44797923/343143609/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220501VR1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_B1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZmYzI5M2QwLTYxYzktZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qIY56bc0ZwimBo7usKhc82HWuG_S0WYLX7hSpSWuSW0=) Between gerrymandering and voter suppression, Black, brown, and young voters have been disenfranchised by bad actors, _time and time again._

We cannot miss a single opportunity to talk to these voters. NPP’s field team is having meaningful conversations within these communities about the issues that matter most to them and connecting the dots on the importance of registering to vote and then voting in every election — twice a year — to reflect a democracy that works for all Pennsylvanians. There’s just over 24 hours left to make their voices heard. **Every door counts.

clean_body: Missed goals mean missed opportunities to expand the electorate = | Fellow activist, we have some bad news. We came up short on fundraising for our voter registration fund. That means missing opportunities to expand the electorate in time for the May primary. But it’s not too late yet. If we can start May off on a good note, we can get ahead on not only our fundraising goal for the month but also our goal of registering 50,000 new voters in 2022. = = Between gerrymandering and voter suppression, Black, brown, and young voters have been disenfranchised by bad actors, time and time again. We cannot miss a single opportunity to talk to these voters. NPP’s field team is having meaningful conversations within these communities about the issues that matter most to them and connecting the dots on the importance of registering to vote and then voting in every election — twice a year — to reflect a democracy that works for all Pennsylvanians. There’s just over 24 hours left to make their voices heard. Every door counts. Every voter counts. Every dollar counts = = Until the change is real, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. Friend,

Thanks to the generosity of this incredible grassroots team, I was able to hit my April fundraising goal (and then some)!

So I’m coming to you with a grateful heart today to say, _**thank you, thank you, thank you!**_

I’m proud to have you by my side in the trenches, and I know that — together — we _will_ win this race, defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis, and build a Florida for All.

— Charlie Crist

**_[P.S. Before you go, will you consider making a donation to my campaign? Gov. DeSantis is working overtime to enact his dangerous, far-right agenda, so we can’t let up now. I hope you’ll make a contribution ASAP. name: Jazz Lewis
subject: I appreciate it so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]
I’m happy to say it -- we met our April grassroots fundraising goal! Thank you so much to everyone who chipped in to fuel our people-powered campaign.
I’m running for re-election to the Maryland House of Delegates because we’ve come so far in building a just and equitable society, but there is still so much we can accomplish.
We must ensure we aren’t leaving our defining challenges for the next generation to struggle with. To tackle these obstacles, we must elect bold, effective, progressive leaders wherever we can.
Let’s keep moving forward together,
Jazz
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=biobox_btn]

I was just looking over the fundraising goal, and we’re behind where we need to be to fully support our candidates coming out of the Primary Election. We are getting resources together to support our candidates fighting to “Take Back Tennessee” as they head into the General Election, but we still need $1,312 to close the gap. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We’re gearing up to partner with candidates across the state. We provide the resources, expertise, and organizers they need to win. With your help, we can change the political landscape of Tennessee. = All the best, Paul Horner he/him Deputy Finance Director, Tennessee Democratic Party The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray. We’re committed to registering 200,000 new voters ahead of the 2022 elections. Given what’s at stake, we can’t afford to miss our chance. | Hi Peter, I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and I over the past few days, but I wanted to make sure that you were the first to know: **thanks to your support, we reached our April fundraising goal!** It’s no exaggeration when I say supporters like you made this possible, Peter. My team and I are so grateful for all that you’ve done and continue to do to support us and our movement to build a more equitable Maryland. But I’ll be honest – hitting this goal came down to the wire. With less than three months left in this race, every single dollar counts and we don’t have any time to waste. And in order to start May off strong, we need to harness all the grassroots support we can ASAP. [_**So please, Peter, will you chip in just a few dollars today to jumpstart our May fundraising?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44798757/343148123/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220501-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220501-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220501&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=e091a8d1-67c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDkxYThkMS02N2M5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTFgtwVUkIVhYoIy9feedVceoNoCxP40b1OcjNq0XU4=)

clean_body: I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and I over the past few days, but I wanted to make sure that you were the first to know: with your help, our team reached our ambitious end-of-month fundraising goal. | = | Hi Peter, I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and I over the past few days, but I wanted to make sure that you were the first to know: thanks to your support, we reached our April fundraising goal! It’s no exaggeration when I say supporters like you made this possible, Peter. My team and I are so grateful for all that you’ve done and continue to do to support us and our movement to build a more equitable Maryland. But I’ll be honest – hitting this goal came down to the wire. With less than three months left in this race, every single dollar counts and we don’t have any time to waste. And in order to start May off strong, we need to harness all the grassroots support we can ASAP. = | = I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important. I know that if we work together, we can and we will build a more just, more prosperous future for all Marylanders. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281934:JtGt7HoN9:m:1:3299561967:F21FC83C0AAD06EBD8C72D07EE0503D1:r)

Patriot,
Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out of touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Patriot, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281934:JtGt7HoN9:m:1:3299561967:F21FC83C0AAD06EBD8C72D07EE0503D1:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281934:JtGt7HoN9:m:1:3299561967:F21FC83C0AAD06EBD8C72D07EE0503D1:r)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your 2022 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWose6RHNN

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on
eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving
Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're
someone who understands that education is essential to the
defense of liberty.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWose6RHNN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will
only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve
liberty for future generations. Thank you!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

**Peter, the GOP has chosen their next target in their cultural war against LGBTQ+ rights: children.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44799190/343150073/304068380?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk480-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGYwZGM4Ny02OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MspKxvem76Zh3aVwk-6BZTSu-ERyId-dDWrUIxCjP-c=&emci=0824afa6-3bc7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68f0dc87-68c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
In Florida, the state Senate passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, a measure that will prohibit Florida teachers from discussing topics involving sexual orientation or gender identity in the classroom. **Nine other states are considering similar proposals.**

In Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott instructed the Texas Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents providing gender-affirming care to their children as child abuse. And, to make matters worse, the Texas Department of Health and Human Services removed LGBTQ+ resources from its suicide-prevention website – **despite the fact that LGBTQ+ youth are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers. **
These attacks on LGBTQ+ children are unacceptable and sickening. Government officials are supposed to fight for _everyone_ – but instead, these extremist officials are targeting the most vulnerable children in their communities for political gain.

**I called on the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Gov. Abbott’s atrocious attacks on trans children, but the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is far from over. Peter, with an ever-increasing number of attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, I need to know where you stand. So please, let me know ASAP: **
| | **Do you believe LGBTQ+ rights should be protected?**
---

clean_body: | | | | | Do you believe LGBTQ+ rights should be protected? | | | | Peter, the GOP has chosen their next target in their cultural war against LGBTQ+ rights: children. In Florida, the state Senate passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, a measure that will prohibit Florida teachers from discussing topics involving sexual orientation or gender identity in the classroom. Nine other states are considering similar proposals. In Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott instructed the Texas Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents providing gender-affirming care to their children as child abuse. And, to make matters worse, the Texas Department of Health and Human Services removed LGBTQ+ resources from its suicide-prevention website – despite the fact that LGBTQ+ youth are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers. These attacks on LGBTQ+ children are unacceptable and sickening. Government officials are supposed to fight for everyone – but instead, these extremist officials are targeting the most vulnerable children in their communities for political gain. I called on the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Gov. Abbott’s atrocious attacks on trans children, but the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is far from over. Peter, with an ever-increasing number of attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, I need to know where you stand. So please, let me know ASAP: | | Do you believe LGBTQ+ rights should be protected? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

name: American Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9901%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ViXIW546BBAdH73LNKh7iQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20086%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N37okxhpZnCcc2vv%2fqQ%2frg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20086%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N37okxhpZnCcc2vv%2fqQ%2frg&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20087%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vk3UwZroY2Jyu1Zo4SiiCg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

Friend,
**May is Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month, and we’re kicking off our celebration with a FREE sticker giveaway.** Our collection of fun stickers are the perfect opportunity for you to show off your AAPI pride, support for the community, and your right to vote! Don’t miss your chance to claim them.
[**Act now: Claim your FREE stickers in celebration of AAPI Heritage Month while supplies last!*.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44804820/343157437/-1799092800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjZiOTgzOC03MGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQeBR99s0c-JdzVAUMt8CVNleyM2jklRqIIBQHvLT2M=&emci=dca9eec1-06c7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d26b9838-70c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)

Asian Americans are one of the most diverse, fastest-growing communities in the country. Like all marginalized groups,**AAPI folks deserve lawmakers and policies that reflect them and the issues they care about.** Today, Asian Americans are the**least represented** in public office – making up just 0.9% of elected officials in the United States – that’s why it’s critical that this community makes its voice heard by turning out the vote.
In the 2020 election cycle/season, the AAPI community saw historic turnout and the highest voter participation growth of any racial group that year. With the midterm elections just around the corner, **we’re committed to sustaining this momentum for AAPI voters across the country** – particularly for young Asian Americans.
This sticker giveaway is one of our many efforts to help turn out AAPI voters, including voter registration events, key partnerships with AAPI-led organizations, online ballot guides and other resources, plus so much more. Stay tuned for updates on our upcoming AAPI month program!

clean_body: Show off your AAPI pride! | | | Fill out our form to claim your FREE stickers for AAPI Heritage Month. | | | Friend, May is Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month, and we’re kicking off our celebration with a FREE sticker giveaway. Our collection of fun stickers are the perfect opportunity for you to show off your AAPI pride, support for the community, and your right to vote! Don’t miss your chance to claim them. Asian Americans are one of the most diverse, fastest-growing communities in the country. Like all marginalized groups,AAPI folks deserve lawmakers and policies that reflect them and the issues they care about. Today, Asian Americans are theleast represented in public office – making up just 0.9% of elected officials in the United States – that’s why it’s critical that this community makes its voice heard by turning out the vote. In the 2020 election cycle/season, the AAPI community saw historic turnout and the highest voter participation growth of any racial group that year. With the midterm elections just around the corner, we’re committed to sustaining this momentum for AAPI voters across the country – particularly for young Asian Americans. This sticker giveaway is one of our many efforts to help turn out AAPI voters, including voter registration events, key partnerships with AAPI-led organizations, online ballot guides and other resources, plus so much more. Stay tuned for updates on our upcoming AAPI month program! "CTA Button" In solidarity, NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | *Free Offer: No purchase necessary. Sarah | Republican HQ

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6841%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=19k51BAnrWrVXWUQrvrdRQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61577%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AyaMtCyuDhGTbmBbQXGc1Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61578%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pw3qbmmdJM%2baJW84IL7E5A&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61579%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hpwWoGUqthxKMjxAC2Ftng&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6841%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=19k51BAnrWrVXWUQrvrdRQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6841%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=19k51BAnrWrVXWUQrvrdRQ&sysid=1)

Friends,

Last year, almost to the day, I walked into my first Dane County Pints & Politics and gave an impromptu speech as a political unknown.

From that day, I have gone from that political unknown, unsure of what to say at a Pints & Politics, to the Republican frontrunner in this race for our voice, passionate about the issues that effect us all on a daily basis!

A year from now, I NEED TO BE IN WASHINGTON!!!

And I need your help to get there, which is why for my birthday, I am asking for donations of $26, $260, or $2,600 - as much as you are able to contribute that I can use to fight for you in the coming months to make the hope of true representation a reality this time next year!

Thank you all so much!

Have a wonderful day!

Charity Barry

name: Tim
subject: I wish I had better news, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3530%2E3611125%2Ez3nH4- ][IMG]

I really wish I had better news, folks—but we came up short of
our April fundraising goal, and in all honesty, I’m anxious about what
comes next.

You see, this puts us in a particularly vulnerable position. For the past
year, we’ve been able to build our team’s resources while the Republicans
duked it out in a messy (and quite frankly, embarrassing) primary.

But Tuesday we’ll finally learn which GOP extremist I’ll take on in
November. And then the full force of the Republican machine—Trump,
McConnell, their billionaire corporate backers, the whole shebang—will
point their arsenal directly at us.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11870?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3530%2E3611125%2Ez3nH4- ]The short version is this: we need resources to weather the storm
that’s headed our way, and FAST. Can you rush $25 to my campaign so we can
go head-to-head with whichever extremist millionaire the GOP nominates on
Tuesday?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11870?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3530%2E3611125%2Ez3nH4- ]RUSH $25 right now!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11870?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3530%2E3611125%2Ez3nH4- ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Tim

And then the full force of the Republican machine—Trump, McConnell, their billionaire corporate backers, the whole shebang—will point their arsenal directly at us. [ - ]The short version is this: we need resources to weather the storm that’s headed our way, and FAST. body:
The government agency charged with enforcing the law, ensuring public safety against foreign threats, and controlling crime has been quite busy formulating an official strategy to “advance equity for marginalized and underserved communities.”

| | |

# [DOJ Issues Justice Equity Plan as Part of Biden Effort to Help Marginalized Communities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58781&L=27188&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLW1heS1iZS1kZWZ5aW5nLWNvdXJ0LW9yZGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
The government agency charged with enforcing the law, ensuring public safety against foreign threats, and controlling crime has been quite busy formulating an official strategy to “advance equity for marginalized and underserved communities.” Made public this month, the policy is known as the Department of Justice Equity Action Plan and among its key initiatives is a reform in law enforcement practices that directs federal prosecutors to ignore maximum sentencing under the law.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58781&L=27188&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLW1heS1iZS1kZWZ5aW5nLWNvdXJ0LW9yZGVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
|
---
| |
---

Robin Crest, et al. v. Alex Padilla (No.20ST-CV-37513). Both parties subsequently filed cross motions for summary judgment. clean_body: The government agency charged with enforcing the law, ensuring public safety against foreign threats, and controlling crime has been quite busy formulating an official strategy to “advance equity for marginalized and underserved communities.” | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | April 29, 2022 ---|---|--- | | The government agency charged with enforcing the law, ensuring public safety against foreign threats, and controlling crime has been quite busy formulating an official strategy to “advance equity for marginalized and underserved communities.” Made public this month, the policy is known as the Department of Justice Equity Action Plan and among its key initiatives is a reform in law enforcement practices that directs federal prosecutors to ignore maximum sentencing under the law. | | | = Judicial Watch The same day AB 979 was signed into law, Judicial Watch, a conservative activist group, sued the secretary of state on behalf of California taxpayers to prevent the state from enforcing AB 979. Robin Crest, et al. v. Alex Padilla (No.20ST-CV-37513). Both parties subsequently filed cross motions for summary judgment. = == Judicial Watch According to Tom Fitton, the president of Judicial Watch, “These documents show Major was a dangerous dog and the Biden White House lied about it, placing Secret Service and other White House personnel at needless risk.” Now it has become clear that there are far more incidents than the White House has acknowledged. == Judicial Watch “Taxpayer funds obviously were being used because there were government officials at NIH working with the University of Pittsburgh to try to mitigate the public outrage at the fetal chop shop that was being run up there with public financing,” Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, told the Daily Caller News Foundation. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44806345/343162736/-766995749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmOTY5NC03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5ufOLCnL68sLUsHYqE0JgKRJjYnr0WChCUydbhSNLw=&emci=51ccfb6e-eac7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=fcff9694-78c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15639879)

Hi friends,

Happy May Day! Or, International Workers' Day, a day we celebrate the working class — the laborers who are the backbone of our community.

Here in Wisconsin, we don't ignore our history — good or bad. The Bay View massacre, where seven workers died striking for an eight-hour workday, is commemorated every year in Milwaukee. It's a grim reminder of how far we've come, and how far we still have to go.

**But there is always hope.**

Just last week, the first Starbucks in Wisconsin unionized, right here in our district! This is a growing trend, and holding corporations to fair and equitable working conditions is a BIG step forward.

Things are looking up for workers, but we need a leader who has their backs — someone who will fight for better wages and benefits, and protect the right to collective bargaining. Someone who stands with the workers, not the CEOs. In other words: **not Bryan Steil.**

Just last year, Bryan voted **against** funding worker protection programs in our federal government — programs that have long been underfunded. It's yet another example of him **voting for his donors, not his constituents.**

Team Roe welcomes union workers and workers who are desperate for a change. It's been hard times the past few years — many are still unable to find work as this pandemic continues, and others are realizing the value of their labor is far more than the wages greedy companies are offering.

I have and will always stand with workers. The folks at IBEW Local 890 know that — it's why they endorsed me!

**[If you're ready for a leader who will fight for workers' rights, not against them, I need your help. This is a BIG election, not just for Wisconsin, but for our Democratic majority in the House. Chip in $5 or whatever you can to help me get to Congress, where I'll keep up the fight for better wages, benefits, and working conditions for ALL.>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44806346/343162737/-1710718972?refcode=em22_220501_mayday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmOTY5NC03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5ufOLCnL68sLUsHYqE0JgKRJjYnr0WChCUydbhSNLw=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44806347/343162738/-1710718972?refcode=em22_220501_mayday&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmOTY5NC03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5ufOLCnL68sLUsHYqE0JgKRJjYnr0WChCUydbhSNLw=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44806348/343162739/-1710718972?refcode=em22_220501_mayday&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmOTY5NC03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D5ufOLCnL68sLUsHYqE0JgKRJjYnr0WChCUydbhSNLw=)

name: Tobias Read GOTV
subject: Will you reach out to your network?
body:
We have a new campaign tool so our most committed supporters can reach out to their network and remind them to vote for Tobias. Will you join our Outreach Circle?
---
| | Dear Peter, Right now Democratic voters across Oregon have ballots sitting on their kitchen table, waiting to be filled out and sent back in. **That means this is the absolute most crucial time for us to get in touch with them to emphasize just how important this primary is to the future of our state.** Research shows that the best person to contact a voter is someone they already know. **[We have a new campaign tool so our most committed supporters can reach out to their network and remind them to vote for Tobias. Will you join our Outreach Circle? | | Dear Peter, Right now Democratic voters across Oregon have ballots sitting on their kitchen table, waiting to be filled out and sent back in. That means this is the absolute most crucial time for us to get in touch with them to emphasize just how important this primary is to the future of our state. Research shows that the best person to contact a voter is someone they already know. The race is close, and the outcome could come down to just a handful of votes on election night. That’s what makes this so critical: Your network of friends and family could be the difference between housing now or ten years from now, between a reinvigorated economy or continued job losses. Thanks, Tobias Read GOTV Team * | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

If we want to lower the crippling prescription drug costs...

If we want to protect Social Security for our most vulnerable...

If we want to stand up for our democracy...

We need a leader who will stand up to the special interests and their political party -- and Don Bacon has stood by Trump, not everyday people like you and me.

I’ll fight for you everyday as your Congressman. But first, I need you to fight for me in these final days before my primary.

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . We don’t want to lose you completely -- but if you want to unsubscribe, you can do so here: ** We can't tell you how much we appreciate your grassroots support! Tony Vargas for Congress PO Box 746 Boys Town, NE 68010 United States info@vargasfornebraska.com | | Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress

Hello,
I’ve dedicated my life to service, enlisting at the age of 20 in the U.S. Navy and serving nearly 40 years before retiring as a three-star Admiral.
Now I’m running for U.S. Senate against Chuck Grassley because elected officials in Washington need to get back to true public service – not serving their own interests and those of their campaign donors.
That’s why talking to voters and grassroots Democrats has been my favorite part of running for office. Nothing can replace hearing directly from the people who are trusting you to be a steward for them and their families in DC.
**As we start a new month, my team created a quick survey, and I hope you’ll just take a few minutes to tell me what you’re concerned about right now and what issues are most important to you and your family right now:**
[**https://www.research.net/r/20220501-nd**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44806551/343163197/245405888?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgwYTk5YS03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u3aDssxeK0BlK0ZleWGTPzQq8AnNYiBEpJnh27R2nho=&emci=081a846d-6bc9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f80a99a-78c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
I’m looking forward to hearing what you have to say.
Thank you for being a part of this campaign,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44806552/343163198/-42398318?refcode=20220501mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjgwYTk5YS03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u3aDssxeK0BlK0ZleWGTPzQq8AnNYiBEpJnh27R2nho=)

body:
| | **Patriot, I 'm so excited to announce that we're OFFICIALLY building the border wall in Texas.**

While Biden does NOTHING, we're stepping up to PROTECT our communities and to keep Texans and Americans SAFE.

The lack of action by the Biden Administration is DISGUSTING, **[which is why I need to ask for your help TODAY.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60281951:JTr1aHoNS:m:1:3299561967:F988918926B6D236A0B5E4C0B86567F8:r "which is why I need to ask for your help TODAY.")**

This is our chance to show the Biden Administration that Texans and Americans SUPPORT the construction of the border wall in the Lone Star State.

Governor Greg Abbott

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: They tell me I don't belong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
If naysayers like Rubio think their attacks will make me feel defeated, they've got another thing coming.
| | |
---
Friend, Marco Rubio is attacking my 27 years of law enforcement service, so I'm reaching out to set the record straight.

Back in 1983, **I answered a call to serve because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm.** And while I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician.

But the problem is, some voters have only heard Marco Rubio's lies about me, and I need more resources to share my story of service with more Floridians before it's too late. Please understand, friend: How quickly I'm able to correct the record for voters will make or break this election.

**[If you can spare $5 , will you donate before midnight to help me counter Rubio's attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44807061/343165181/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3048-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgwYTk5YS03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbeztgCm5bELF89MwUj8UjvgV01aD_l1qEq849XmRKQ=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44807062/343165189/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3048-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgwYTk5YS03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbeztgCm5bELF89MwUj8UjvgV01aD_l1qEq849XmRKQ=)
I was one of eight women in a class of 30 when I joined the police academy – but I always remembered what my mom had told me: "Be the best you can be, even if people say you don't belong."
And when it came time to choose a class president, one of the other women in our class convinced me to run. I was nervous, but I went for it – and I won by a landslide.
**I graduated not only as class president, but at the top of my class.** When I got out of the academy, I went straight to work protecting and serving my community. And after decades of service, **I became the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.**
Fast forward to today, I'm about to take on my biggest challenge yet. There are obstacles ahead, but with my "never tire" attitude and a massive grassroots movement behind me, I know that I can become Florida's next U.S. senator and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

**[If you're on my side, please donate $5 or whatever you can to help me share my story with more voters and defeat Marco Rubio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44807063/343165192/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3048-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTgwYTk5YS03OGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EbeztgCm5bELF89MwUj8UjvgV01aD_l1qEq849XmRKQ=)**

**I'm no stranger to adversity, friend. If naysayers like Rubio think their attacks will make me feel defeated, they've got another think coming. I've heard it all before – and I've only come out stronger.**
Thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Chief Val Demings

clean_body: If naysayers like Rubio think their attacks will make me feel defeated, they've got another thing coming. | | | Friend, Marco Rubio is attacking my 27 years of law enforcement service, so I'm reaching out to set the record straight. Back in 1983, I answered a call to serve because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. And while I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. But the problem is, some voters have only heard Marco Rubio's lies about me, and I need more resources to share my story of service with more Floridians before it's too late. Please understand, friend: How quickly I'm able to correct the record for voters will make or break this election. = = I was one of eight women in a class of 30 when I joined the police academy – but I always remembered what my mom had told me: "Be the best you can be, even if people say you don't belong." And when it came time to choose a class president, one of the other women in our class convinced me to run. I was nervous, but I went for it – and I won by a landslide. I graduated not only as class president, but at the top of my class. When I got out of the academy, I went straight to work protecting and serving my community. And after decades of service, I became the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police. Fast forward to today, I'm about to take on my biggest challenge yet. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you for your support in April
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
We sent a number of fundraising emails ahead of last night’s fundraising deadline, so the least I could do was send one more to say thank you for all of your support.
We received tens of thousands of donations in those final days ahead of our $1 million deadline. It all adds up to help us fight back against the attack ads running right now, and that’s how we win.
So, when you see us on television, or running ads online, or you see the efforts of our 15 County Campaign in Arizona, or when you see us rising in the polls and when we celebrate our victory in November, it’s these donations that made it possible.
So, thank you again. When I first decided to run for Senate, I never imagined in my wildest dreams we’d run a campaign where almost every donation we received came from someone chipping in just a few bucks — but that’s what’s happened.
I am very proud of that fact, and you should be too.
Thanks again,
Mark
* * *

**We’re starting off the month of May looking for 10,000 people to add their name as personal endorsers of Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. Can you click on “Endorse Mark” below and get your name on the list? It would mean a lot.**
**[ENDORSE MARK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-may/?source=em220501-1-7&t=1&akid=2724%2E6688874%2EBsixc_)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=2724%2E6688874%2EBsixc_).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Our Revolution
subject: REV REPORT: The Latest News!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| | Insider News from the Political Revolution!

* * *
**HEADLINES: Nina vs. SuperPACS | New Endorsements! Amy Vilela - Brittany Ramos DeBarros - Summer Lee | Bernie Calls Out Biden | Ro Khanna | NY Health Act | & MORE!**

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=11&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

Today, workers around the world celebrate **May Day** -- the **International Workers’ Day** established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the **Haymarket Massacre** in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day.

Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader **August Spies** said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for **the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement**.”

Spies showed **solidarity** with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. **Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.**

[Become a member of Our Revolution, and receive your commemorative MAY DAY STICKER today!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5451?t=12&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=13&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

Join us this **Tuesday at 8:30p ET** /7:30 CT for a special **Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy** with our partners at **Free Speech for People** and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

We’ll speak with courageous **Our Revolution** members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like **Marjorie Taylor-Greene**. And, we’re recruiting _progressive patriots_ across the country to get engaged in this fight!

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=14&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=15&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=16&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS**

Billionaires and oil barons are **lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents** in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “**Mainstream Democrats PAC** ” to try to stop progressives from taking power.

Working-class fighters like **Nina Turner** , **Rep. Andy Levin** , **David Segal** , and **Jessica Cisneros** are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, **we have their back** , and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the **true mainstream positions** of the _people_ in this country.

**The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races.**

Our candidates rely on the power of the movement -- campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. **[Join our Phonebank Force](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=17&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw) to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money**.

★ ★ ★

[The primaries are heating up, and we have some truly phenomenal candidates on the ballot – organizers, teachers, and diverse working-class fighters – stepping forward to lead _with_ our movement. Become a Movement Builder today to help progressives seize the levers of power from corporate Dems.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_1MO_20220501_1_1&recurring=true?t=18&refcode2=2855_5885482_gCxIVw&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=19&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2**
THE HOMESTRETCH

Folks, this is not a drill --
**This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress!**

**Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now!** So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT!

**If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote** before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave.

“**The energy on the ground is palpable!** ” Nina told us. “**Now is the time to maximize our efforts together**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=20&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 -- and the billionaires know it.** But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “**All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale!** ”

As **Katrina vanden Heuvel** wrote in [The Washington Post](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5452?t=21&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw), noting **Our Revolution’s** support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the _soul_ of the party.”

“Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with **a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement** that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated.

“**Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it -- both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight**,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree.

NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=22&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1** , and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that.

“The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “**I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All** , and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.”

Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator **Anna-Marta Visky** spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district.

“**This work is paying off big time** ,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a **more engaged voter base** , and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!”

Healthcare justice advocate **Michael Lighty** said, “**Our Revolution walks the walk** and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.”

“**They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing -- we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country**,” Nina said.

This is a new day and a new district -- which includes **all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points,** and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go!

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=23&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs** , which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote.

So far, **150 Our Revolution volunteers** have made **60k phone calls** and **sent 40k texts** and **330k emails** connecting with voters for Nina.

**Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night!** With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line.

[VOLUNTEER FOR NINA](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4901?t=24&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=25&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

As one of our movement’s **fiercest champions for Medicare for All** , **Our Revolution** is honored to endorse **Amy Vilela for Congress** in Nevada’s 1st District.

Amy served as **Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020** campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat.

“**I am running to represent the working class** ,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “**This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table**.”

**Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate -- she knows the struggle firsthand.** Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when **tragedy struck in 2015**.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=26&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

“The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” **Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise -- or die trying.**

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=27&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

Electing true allies like Amy is how we **change the composition of Congress** and make democracy work. Now we need your help to win this crucial race for our movement.

[VOLUNTEER FOR AMY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5437?t=28&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=29&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**Our Revolution** and **Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network** are backing **Brittany Ramos DeBarros** for Congress in NY-11!

Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community.

“**I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible** ,” Brittany said on our [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=30&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw) on Monday.

The **Amazon Labor Union** drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “**These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=31&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story -- though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship.

“Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “**Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education**.”

**Medicare for All** and a **Green New Deal** are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said.

In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. **The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters** and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.”

If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. [Click here to get started](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5434?t=32&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)!

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=33&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

“**This race is a huge opportunity** ,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and **we will make history**.”

We hope you’ll help **Our Revolution** ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. **Your calls will make a huge impact in this district!**

[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5435?t=34&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)
