**Our Revolution** is thrilled to endorse **Summer Lee** for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District!

Summer worked as a labor organizer with the **Fight for $15** , organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead **voter mobilization** efforts to strengthen our democracy.

In 2018, she made history as the **first Black woman from Western PA** ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of **Our Revolution**.

“**Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office** ,” Summer said on our [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=36&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw) on Monday.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=37&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

“**As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside -- that’s a powerful movement right there**,” she said.

In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy.

“The number one support for lazy incumbency is **low voter turnout and voter suppression**. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said.

“**We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=38&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw)

**Why now?** Larry told Aaron White of [Open Democracy](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5458?t=54&akid=2855%2E5885482%2EgCxIVw) that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, **working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them**.”

“**Greta Thunberg** testified and said it would be a **gut punch for Democrats** to have both chambers and the presidency and **not repeal fossil fuel subsidies** ,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.”

To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s **Billionaires Tax** , Ro said: “**There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires** , and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.”

Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “**Folks don’t believe the promises anymore** ,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse -- decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. **We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country**.”

Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build **Our Revolution** and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.”

Amy Vilela - Brittany Ramos DeBarros - Summer Lee | Bernie Calls Out Biden | Ro Khanna | NY Health Act | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day -- the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day. Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.” Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice. ★ ★ ★ Join us this Tuesday at 8:30p ET /7:30 CT for a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot. We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS Billionaires and oil barons are lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “Mainstream Democrats PAC ” to try to stop progressives from taking power. Working-class fighters like Nina Turner , Rep. Andy Levin , David Segal , and Jessica Cisneros are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, we have their back , and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the true mainstream positions of the people in this country. The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races. Our candidates rely on the power of the movement -- campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2 THE HOMESTRETCH Folks, this is not a drill -- This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress! Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now! So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT! If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave. “The energy on the ground is palpable! ” Nina told us. “Now is the time to maximize our efforts together.” This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 -- and the billionaires know it. But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale! ” As Katrina vanden Heuvel wrote in , noting Our Revolution’s support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the soul of the party.” “Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated. “Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it -- both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree. NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1 , and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that. “The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All , and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.” Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district. “This work is paying off big time ,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a more engaged voter base , and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!” Healthcare justice advocate Michael Lighty said, “Our Revolution walks the walk and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.” “They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing -- we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country,” Nina said. This is a new day and a new district -- which includes all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points, and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go! Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs , which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote. So far, 150 Our Revolution volunteers have made 60k phone calls and sent 40k texts and 330k emails connecting with voters for Nina. Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night! With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line. ★ ★ ★ As one of our movement’s fiercest champions for Medicare for All , Our Revolution is honored to endorse Amy Vilela for Congress in Nevada’s 1st District. Amy served as Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat. “I am running to represent the working class ,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table.” Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate -- she knows the struggle firsthand. Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when tragedy struck in 2015. “The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise -- or die trying. Electing true allies like Amy is how we change the composition of Congress and make democracy work. Now we need your help to win this crucial race for our movement. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution and Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network are backing Brittany Ramos DeBarros for Congress in NY-11! Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community. “I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible ,” Brittany said on our on Monday. The Amazon Labor Union drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country.” Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story -- though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship. “Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education.” Medicare for All and a Green New Deal are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said. In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.” If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. ! “This race is a huge opportunity ,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and we will make history.” We hope you’ll help Our Revolution ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. Your calls will make a huge impact in this district! ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Summer Lee for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District! Summer worked as a labor organizer with the Fight for $15 , organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead voter mobilization efforts to strengthen our democracy. In 2018, she made history as the first Black woman from Western PA ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of Our Revolution. “Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office ,” Summer said on our on Monday. “As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside -- that’s a powerful movement right there,” she said. In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy. “The number one support for lazy incumbency is low voter turnout and voter suppression. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said. “We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape.” Rep. Lee has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution Pennsylvania. Help us elect progressive allies like Summer to make democracy work for all of us. ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters like Amy Vilela , Brittany Ramos DeBarros , Summer Lee , and of course Nina Turner! We must replace the enemies of progress in Congress with strong movement partners. Our Revolution Volunteer Taylor Pinckney told us how good it feels when our efforts pay off. While she was phone banking, a voter a voter mentioned that her call and a mailer from Our Revolution helped him switch from a centrist candidate to Erica Smith for Congress in NC-1. “He thanked us for opening his eyes that Erica was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor told us. “It was cool to see the impact -- when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going.” If you have just one hour a week, you can make a difference, too! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ BERNIE ENDORSES NIDA ALLAM Our Revolution is backing Nida Allam for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th district -- and, now it’s official, Bernie is too! “Nida Allam knows that it takes a true grassroots movement to defeat big money special interests and deliver real change for working people,” Bernie said. “Together in Congress, we will fight for the working class by standing up for M4A, GND, and a living wage.” Nida was political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign and currently serves on the Durham County Commission. The first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in North Carolina , she voted to raise the minimum wage for county employees to a living wage. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ BERNIE STANDS WITH WORKERS, CALLS ON BIDEN TO ACT! This weekend, Our Revolution joined Bernie and AOC as they hit the road to rally with workers fighting to unionize against some of the most powerful corporate forces on Earth. On Sunday afternoon, Bernie Amazon Labor Union ahead of their 2nd union election at the LDJ5 facility in Staten Island. By evening, he was speaking to a crowd at a for Starbucks Workers United in Richmond, Va. On Tuesday, Bernie was live on the calling out Amazon’s “illegal anti-union tactics” and calling on President Biden to issue an executive order prohibiting any company that engages in union-busting from getting federal government contracts, reports. “Amazon is the poster child for why this anti-union busting Executive Order is needed,” Bernie said. “President Biden, you promised to prevent union-busters like Amazon from receiving lucrative contracts from the federal government. Keep that promise.” Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is -- Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better future. ★ ★ ★ Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day -- the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day. Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.” Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice. ★ ★ ★ LARRY COHEN ON THE LABOR FIGHT Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen , a lifelong labor leader, joined our on Monday to dig into the rise of worker organizing. “This is an exciting time -- not only at Amazon and Starbucks, but there’s all kinds of organizing at workplaces across the country. The first Apple retail store joined my union CWA,” Larry said. “This is organizing from the bottom up, and that’s what we believe in here at Our Revolution.” Why now? Larry told Aaron White of that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them.” ★ ★ ★ RO KHANNA TALKS POLICY FIGHTS Also on our latest , Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen asked US Rep. Ro Khanna about legislation to end taxpayer subsidies to the fossil fuel industry. “Greta Thunberg testified and said it would be a gut punch for Democrats to have both chambers and the presidency and not repeal fossil fuel subsidies ,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.” To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s Billionaires Tax , Ro said: “There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires , and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.” Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “Folks don’t believe the promises anymore ,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse -- decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country.” Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build Our Revolution and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.” ★ ★ ★ FIGHTING FOR HEALTHCARE IN NY On Tuesday, Our Revolution joined Campaign for NY Health and other groups in Albany for a Day of Action calling on the state to pass the NY Health Act to provide universal healthcare to every New Yorker and end medical debt. Organizers, activists, labor leaders, and legislators all came together to march, rally, and speak in one voice to demand New York electeds prioritize healthcare justice before they go on recess on June 2 to campaign for re-election. Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar spoke to attendees at the rally: “Every New Yorker — and every person in America — deserves full healthcare and to be free from the burden of medical costs. Our lives are on the line.” ★ ★ ★ 2022 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE KICKOFF! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders , we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Mark your calendars for May 9th, when we’ll be joined by progressive powerhouse Rashida Tlaib on our next National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast -- 8:30p ET /5:30p PT. ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters and replace the corporate-aligned politicians up and down the ballot. If you have an hour or two a week, you can power our movement as a caller with the ! Our crew will be there to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ The Tar Heel State deserves a great progressive in Congress. State Sen. Erica Smith running in NC-1 fits the bill to a tee. Join Our Revolution’s Campaign Team and help us elect Erica! ★ ★ ★ Help us get Attica Scott to Congress! Join the Our Revolution Phonebank Force and help us make calls to Louisville and the rest of Kentucky’s 3rd congressional district to get another progressive in Congress! ★ ★ ★ On May 3rd, we’re holding a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot. We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members \- and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! ★ ★ ★ Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month , you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ | | | | | **Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. | ** PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Nominate a hero in your community
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
It’s time to highlight local heroes across Washington state.
#
Peter,
It makes me so proud every time I meet someone from Washington state who faced a challenge, and not only met it, but made sure other people in their community didn’t have to go through that same thing.
I know that’s not easy to do because I’ve done it myself. When I was told I couldn’t make a difference for my community–because I was “just a mom in tennis shoes”–I didn’t let that stop me. And neither do so many people across our state, every single day. This award is for them.
**The Golden Tennis Shoe Awards is my favorite event each year because we get to highlight local heroes who make a real impact across Washington state.**
**[Do you know an everyday hero in your community who should be recognized at the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards? Nominate them now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44807446/343167281/801594024?ms=pm_em_220501_1_a&refcode=pm_em_220501_1_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VjNjA3ZC03ZGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weQMuxGtYq_1HFPAt5x3ykuN-mmnSDPeHvbZsMIjZdQ=&emci=4daacedd-9dc8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=87ec607d-7dc9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13116610)**
Maybe you know a single dad with a full-time job who still carved out time to volunteer and help those who are struggling.
Or a big-hearted young person who launched a fundraiser at their school to support the people of Ukraine during this tumultuous time.
Each year, I’m proud to honor individuals who not only overcame the odds, but selflessly go out into their communities to help others along the way. And I need your help to identify the heroes who deserve this honor.
I’m sure you know someone exactly like this. **[Nominate them for the GTS Awards now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44807447/343167282/801594024?ms=pm_em_220501_1_a&refcode=pm_em_220501_1_a&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VjNjA3ZC03ZGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=weQMuxGtYq_1HFPAt5x3ykuN-mmnSDPeHvbZsMIjZdQ=&emci=4daacedd-9dc8-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=87ec607d-7dc9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,
Patty
**[P.S. clean_body: It’s time to highlight local heroes across Washington state. Peter, It makes me so proud every time I meet someone from Washington state who faced a challenge, and not only met it, but made sure other people in their community didn’t have to go through that same thing. I know that’s not easy to do because I’ve done it myself. When I was told I couldn’t make a difference for my community–because I was “just a mom in tennis shoes”–I didn’t let that stop me. And neither do so many people across our state, every single day. This award is for them. The Golden Tennis Shoe Awards is my favorite event each year because we get to highlight local heroes who make a real impact across Washington state. Maybe you know a single dad with a full-time job who still carved out time to volunteer and help those who are struggling. Or a big-hearted young person who launched a fundraiser at their school to support the people of Ukraine during this tumultuous time. Each year, I’m proud to honor individuals who not only overcame the odds, but selflessly go out into their communities to help others along the way. And I need your help to identify the heroes who deserve this honor. I’m sure you know someone exactly like this. Thank you, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Dan Farough
subject: A bit of news in April I hope you saw
body:
Friend, what a month. Jocelyn was formally endorsed by the Michigan Democratic Party for another term as secretary of state, we got our opponent for the November general election, and it was announced that Jocelyn will be receiving the 2022 Profile in Courage Award for her work defending democracy. Of course, all this happened while Jocelyn continued to innovate and expand services from the Office of Secretary of State. I’ll say it again, friend . What a month.

Below, you’ll find some updates about Jocelyn and some other news I think you’ll find interesting.

On April 9th, Jocelyn was endorsed by the Michigan Democratic Party for a second term as secretary of state. As the chair of Jocelyn’s campaign I see this as the formal beginning of our fight to make sure Jocelyn is re-elected in November. But this was also an important opportunity for Jocelyn to share her success thus far and her vision to continue defending democracy. Here’s one of my favorite quotes from her speech.

“If you and I and people of integrity across the state come together to speak the truth, stand up for Michigan elections, and compel officials to follow the facts and obey our laws, democracy will prevail.” - Jocelyn

The other big news in April was the announcement that Jocelyn will be receiving the 2022 Profile in Courage Award from the John F. Kennedy Library Foundation. But did you know that Jocelyn’s administration was also recognized with awards from the U.S. Election Assistance Commission?

The national awards were for improving Accessibility for Voters with Disabilities and Outstanding Innovation in Election Cybersecurity and Technology. Congratulations to Jocelyn and the entire Secretary of State team.

These prestigious awards are recognition that Jocelyn is successfully improving Secretary of State services and defending democracy. Sign our petition telling Jocelyn that you stand with her with this important work. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/TIPOPuC-MkWn3wgFhVZlhA2?emci=af7d953e-12c1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=]

Here’s a quick customer service update from Jocelyn’s office. Even through boat registration season, the office has continued to offer branch office service on average in 20 minutes or less.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93087/images/April%20Customer%20Service%20Update.png]

In addition to offering faster office service and expanded online options, there are other service updates to talk about this month.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93087/images/JB%20Mobile%20Office.png]

1. Jocelyn’s administration continues implementing new laws that allow Michiganders to restore their driver’s license after losing it for minor infractions. The department is conducting Road to Restoration [https://www.michigan.gov/sos/license-id/Road-to-Restoration] clinics around the state - last month’s were held in Detroit, Grand Rapids, and Muskegon - to help countless people get back behind the wheel so they can get to work, take their children to the doctor, and pick up groceries for their families.

2. Jocelyn is also expanding the mobile office program, which brings services directly to communities most in need, like those experiencing homelessness and senior centers and foster care facilities. In addition to the one that currently serves Southeast Michigan, there will be two, new mobile offices serving western and central Michigan by the end of summer.

Finally, our November opponent was officially endorsed by the Michigan GOP so we’re off to the races!

Donate>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=050122

That’s all I’ve got this month folks. Enjoy the gradually warming weather, and as always thanks for your support.

All the best,
Dan Farough
Campaign Chair

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO Box 21368
Detroit, MI 48221
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fqSK2PQg_UCkKErG0V0_Ew2?unsubscribedata=V%2BtMfrgJIrO82ziayV7VcT6Mvsj0MGy4UGZg%2FQkA%2F9yy6IxZ9vQLQvYR79P4ca7MYMkfEEP5xJ%2B7QvtJt%2Fi03JyCMlFBew3nf09%2Fyc%2Fa7lEKorteuxlhiAf%2Bsd52NE87iBhFZFVeTxpXVbiUU2paI8pFYSU28py%2FpOjBPu2%2FrVOrPCnosES6Vq8ZJxhgGrGoMQU%2BvDuhtBNznIqDLHwJRkHvQ%2FVC4ZXsSIzxBiRjks2geQBgApN9TDnYx3oF0nrXBd%2BtqJtpxMgxvdjSNAoa0KHogRpb9JUSO1q57DUcl3hyEpaFMjYIITb40drNI0jcmlLDzBDT2R0SsipqHUf53aHJRbHr9I3yq0tW%2FhHDinrtc1D87gGk0dP0Qqo4Z7kXwFHYOo65ueBvsWbtWv2Vl9VwWDwTzbVxXTa%2FSrQ2ECM%3D .

name: Mo Brooks
subject: RE: the latest national security threat

body:
One of the greatest threats our nation is facing is the illegal alien invasion taking place at our southern border.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpu1dbmraiopsrjr0hoi9cp9s2aosq18qfdva5jo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ueob2dpj6ar3ddj4cliefdpieoqmcojlc3h78sln66o71db4seq33dj36hrr9dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmipm4o3im5j32d5jcgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5chgmcp33chim49fg)

Rush a donation to help him reach his $45K fundraising goal so he can fight for border security!**
---
[**FIGHT THE INVASION →**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3b9259t4agbqofk1bvfhu2o9bhljefnk9o7540_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)

---
Friend, One of the **_greatest_** threats our nation is facing is the illegal alien invasion taking place at our southern border. Joe Biden and the Socialist Democrats are welcoming illegal aliens with open arms – _**[and it’s a national security nightmare!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn3oj7svpkve943pgpbvkkd3mgtoaj5ug73avck0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)**_

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znut2evkgtojodg0m7muklpt9l18m06cn2ltjaig_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)
---
[**FIGHT THE ILLEGAL ALIEN INVASION**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsul7lrsfkno5mef1pdpsrs60krn2hmjbr3c4fdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)
---
**The Socialist Democrats allowed a tsunami of illegal aliens to flood our country as they put up a fence around the Capitol. ** **I think that’s unacceptable.** It’s unfair to our voters. It’s disastrous to our constituents. And it’s catastrophic to our great Republic, which these socialists are trying to turn into the next Venezuela or Cuba. It’s why I’ve been sounding the alarm everywhere I can: **_we need to stop the Socialist Democrats running Washington!_**
---
[**STOP THE SOCIALIST DEMOCRATS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8h16qs4cj707ot98odr4fj6prvkbhc55tpek1o8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)
---
Under President Trump, we put a STOP to the unchecked influx of illegal immigration and were building a WALL to prevent illegal aliens' crossing. And instead of putting Americans’ interest FIRST, Socialist Democrats put us LAST! **This is our chance to once and for all tell Joe Biden and his Socialist allies in Congress that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH – we will not stand for illegal alien amnesty in America!**
---
[**FIGHT FOR BORDER SECURITY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5238nkob45bchq5rf9979ps53l4clequpl61vn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z68evge2fulh4519oa2458kps9ho1i55gijpmbcg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks – I represent Alabama’s 5th Congressional District in the U.S. House. But I’m running for the Senate because I’m tired of seeing radical, destructive policies under Chuck Schumer’s feckless leadership.** I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles – and the accolades to back it up:
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* __A+ rating from NumbersUSA, an immigration watchdog group__
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

And I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Congressman Jim Jordan
* House Freedom Caucus Chairman Scott Perry
* Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene
* Dr. Kelli Ward
* Mark Levin

---
[**JOIN THEM SUPPORT MO BROOKS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqecfn4vpva22rtcs2809fnu79nku0c0o9imhk8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)
---
I’m committed to fighting for border security, friend. It’s one policy I vow to fight for in the Senate, just as I always have in the House. **[Can you chip in to send me to the Senate, where I can tackle the Socialist Democrats’ disastrous open border policies and fight to build the wall and stop the illegal alien invasion?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3etlcobil4q6jg64sbd1b0vns9ppp3op7god3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5j68or4clh2bs)**

Thank you for fighting the invasion alongside me.

name: Marie Kistner
subject: I’ve known Tyler since high school
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Today, I want to tell you a little bit about my husband Tyler that I don’t think you’ve heard yet... Tyler and I met in high school, in Minnesota. We got married right after college, and that’s when he came to me and told me he had a calling to serve our country. We prayed about it together and decided together, that he was going to join the U.S. Marine Corps. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0dc16edda31a4fbfbf8d528511913710&_e=NL-zyNWTZh_JeZ6e0QjSJ8Y17ikfsd_wiRSB98JVgfQH_H4sq5U5ylcd1mqwzoV58XrLZbih9Gr-G6xHE5Zfxlh6w64I0SVKk0TdM7B0wW-GIqiuXOl-861C3R1q3Rpfp-XZT4SHE-rDF-mLNzVi27MKUCMgwL6vfy05Ok7LQkw--DwihlUriSuJJLGz_KEvv6l_0JHweZGl0MBq8KMEh6RvcLBh7Edqc0pta0KHr_xFL8LiyBmvWWSZd1DICgiYEkW00wrRQoC8ki1S_w42OYNCn2nHNsNyVW9QDU_EKFdQdbCmFbW03889FyabZJH29cDinccWAeZjDyn2rsVGXetXC_mdzaVNvpn6NwUg7bvWyAXb6o12WwK-AuTMceMO0yPXnqX-e-FKVwmG2lUPo2MtE5Y-8_gX6k3i9jMJstEBPNY-KTQb72lPvXJU59Sj)

---
Fellow American,

Today, I want to tell you a little bit about my husband Tyler that I don’t think you’ve heard yet...

Tyler and I met in high school, in Minnesota. We got married right after college, and that’s when he came to me and told me he had a calling to serve our country. We prayed about it together and decided together, that he was going to join the U.S. Marine Corps.

For nine years, as we built our life together Tyler was dialed in on one thing: serving our country. I’ve always known him like that, to have a servant’s heart. It’s the cornerstone of our marriage, and what we instill in our two young children.

When we came home and settled back down in Minnesota and Tyler joined the reserves, we became scared about the future for our family, for all families. _How were we going to afford to live, what would our kids learn in school, would crime rage in our city?_ Tyler--being the man that he is--decided he had to jump in and help somehow.

So once again, we prayed about it together, and Tyler began his race for Congress in a top swing district. He ran his race the same way he does everything, with a servant’s heart. I watched as he went from event to event, met with people and heard the changes they wanted to see in our country. Once again, I was proud to call that man my husband.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0dc16edda31a4fbfbf8d528511913710&_e=NL-zyNWTZh_JeZ6e0QjSJ8Y17ikfsd_wiRSB98JVgfQH_H4sq5U5ylcd1mqwzoV58XrLZbih9Gr-G6xHE5Zfxlh6w64I0SVKk0TdM7B0wW-GIqiuXOl-861C3R1q3Rpfp-XZT4SHE-rDF-mLNzVi27MKUCMgwL6vfy05Ok7LQkw--DwihlUriSuJJLGz_KEvv6l_0JHweZGl0MBq8KMEh6RvcLBh7Edqc0pta0KHr_wSwL27hjyMc-DAN13b0Z63k4barwd4ixpIxCu_FW7atMhihmxXWZkeiT2NMnp6iNn7CjyJ6Qk6kTFooFCbphxxKZea7Qdf8Gk8zRMIupoFSmUq6NNYbOE2iNEf8t1l6EdCF0jk9HTSPE2wTkYKq5GTtjG6n8mfdAQhOHvhdv0G5Qx3XJlQ9zP1k3gGuqdRa_D2KsrDdvPBGa_cmOqBI_7S)

Ultimately, Tyler was barely beat out by a well-funded Democrat who didn’t care about our children’s futures or the crime plaguing our state. But Tyler refused to accept that, and we made the decision together that he needed to run again. Now, he’s back in this race against the same opponent, and there’s still so much work to be done. [**It would be such a difference maker in this race if you would step forward and invest in Tyler today. Can we count on your support?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0dc16edda31a4fbfbf8d528511913710&_e=NL-zyNWTZh_JeZ6e0QjSJ8Y17ikfsd_wiRSB98JVgfQH_H4sq5U5ylcd1mqwzoV58XrLZbih9Gr-G6xHE5Zfxlh6w64I0SVKk0TdM7B0wW-GIqiuXOl-861C3R1q3Rpfp-XZT4SHE-rDF-mLNzVi27MKUCMgwL6vfy05Ok7LQkw--DwihlUriSuJJLGz_KEvv6l_0JHweZGl0MBq8KMEh6RvcLBh7Edqc0pta0KHr_yhPhVpj3e_I7zPX1WNhiufeYtNpsSRVvLPoqAwX5FinWn25_saPmT4N-ePiNJwI0K2xMwcNW_A-WjCpMEZCnrc6EyNIWSdgBOR8TQrGP0KLKjkKqI--IlddbtjeKrBunqtnjdJhmFxzQvmW400pu9YcaDPsOoPd4Rm3HKrZeWrU4PDvT3AMnbSlj9OGemt3IUfbzn17ZW07UTn8_nDZdxK)

[ INVEST IN TYLER >> ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0dc16edda31a4fbfbf8d528511913710&_e=NL-zyNWTZh_JeZ6e0QjSJ8Y17ikfsd_wiRSB98JVgfQH_H4sq5U5ylcd1mqwzoV58XrLZbih9Gr-G6xHE5Zfxlh6w64I0SVKk0TdM7B0wW-GIqiuXOl-861C3R1q3Rpfp-XZT4SHE-rDF-mLNzVi27MKUCMgwL6vfy05Ok7LQkw--DwihlUriSuJJLGz_KEvv6l_0JHweZGl0MBq8KMEh6RvcLBh7Edqc0pta0KHr_x5fKuBcSEefY80L6e2I0cYgwRyi1z6Jn1ERRWIZwDGQNlH8l_KYxNvJNQyDXe_vWHvsQPHF6LY_jLMUvaaOHEWU4pge3Y8KAFCv2aKiFj4RsAcTtHKN4PyVxJSkvxNOaXKCrIOxV0lEn4UamKpSfiQbR6Rr4MF7e0WuJunyqL7yK5Bq2GsaWOLxaerLAI3i3JIZ8PtNdxzh1gxq8hI_Ka3)
Tyler and I have always approached our marriage as a team. When our daughter cries because she wants more ice cream after dinner, we stick together. When our son wants to stay at the park for longer, we stick together.

It might not be much, but one thing I can guarantee you about Tyler is that he will always listen to you and stick with you if you’re on his team. We got married right after college, and that’s when he came to me and told me he had a calling to serve our country. We prayed about it together and decided together, that he was going to join the U.S. Marine Corps. | Fellow American, Today, I want to tell you a little bit about my husband Tyler that I don’t think you’ve heard yet... Tyler and I met in high school, in Minnesota. We got married right after college, and that’s when he came to me and told me he had a calling to serve our country. We prayed about it together and decided together, that he was going to join the U.S. Marine Corps. For nine years, as we built our life together Tyler was dialed in on one thing: serving our country. I’ve always known him like that, to have a servant’s heart. It’s the cornerstone of our marriage, and what we instill in our two young children. When we came home and settled back down in Minnesota and Tyler joined the reserves, we became scared about the future for our family, for all families. How were we going to afford to live, what would our kids learn in school, would crime rage in our city? Tyler--being the man that he is--decided he had to jump in and help somehow. So once again, we prayed about it together, and Tyler began his race for Congress in a top swing district. He ran his race the same way he does everything, with a servant’s heart. I watched as he went from event to event, met with people and heard the changes they wanted to see in our country. Once again, I was proud to call that man my husband. Ultimately, Tyler was barely beat out by a well-funded Democrat who didn’t care about our children’s futures or the crime plaguing our state. But Tyler refused to accept that, and we made the decision together that he needed to run again. Now, he’s back in this race against the same opponent, and there’s still so much work to be done. Tyler and I have always approached our marriage as a team. When our daughter cries because she wants more ice cream after dinner, we stick together. name: Cecile Richards
subject: I have an exciting announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Hi — it’s
Cecile Richards, former President of Planned Parenthood and a proud,
lifelong Texan.

I wanted to personally let you know that I’m officially joining Beto’s
campaign as National Finance Chair.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55897?refcode=ema20220501-187171&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=187171%2E444211%2E8RQMHp ]I believe Texans deserve so much better from their governor. If you’re
with me, will you do your part and contribute now to help Beto win this
election?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55897?refcode=ema20220501-187171&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=187171%2E444211%2E8RQMHp ]Contribute $3

I’m proud to be part of
the team that’s going to make sure this campaign has the resources,
support, and backing necessary to finally turn a corner in Texas.

When my mom, Ann Richards, ran for governor of Texas, she won by building
a coalition of people who had been left behind by state government for far
too long.

Now, Beto is doing the exact same thing as he travels to every part of the
state with a focus on improving public education, creating good-paying
jobs, and expanding access to affordable health care.

His vision for Texas is positive and unifying — but I also know that as
governor, he’ll serve as the last line of defense against extreme attacks
on reproductive rights, civil rights, voting rights, and workers’ rights.

But Beto can’t win this race alone. This is going to be one of the most
competitive elections in Texas history, and Beto is counting on our
support every step of the way.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55897?refcode=ema20220501-187171&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=187171%2E444211%2E8RQMHp ]I’m asking because it couldn’t be more important: Will you chip in
$3 or more to Beto’s campaign for governor? The future of
Texas is on the line.

Thank you. We’re in this
together.

Cecile

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=187171%2E444211%2E8RQMHp

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

body:

Team,
This is Congresswoman Joyce Beatty.
I am so proud to serve Ohio’s Third District in Congress – and I wake up every morning ready to do whatever I can do to help the hardworking families in my district get ahead and succeed.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Pass the PRO Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| It’s ironic to hear some of my colleagues’ defenses of the filibuster — that it promotes bipartisanship when it’s being used to prevent a bipartisan House-passed bill from getting a fair vote in the Senate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe)
Derek,
It’s no secret that dozens, and dozens, and dozens, of House-passed bills full of Democratic priorities have been collecting dust in the Senate in Mitch McConnell’s filibuster graveyard.
And since today is May Day, I want to highlight one in particular, that shows why it’s so important that we keep up the pressure on Senate Democrats to abolish the filibuster.
I’m talking about the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act_ or _PRO Act_ for short. It is the single most pro-union bill to pass the House in decades. That’s right, decades.
This bipartisan bill would begin to turn the tide against a decades-long assault on workers’ rights, from so-called “right to work” laws passed by Republican states to the union-busting efforts of some major corporations.
Workers have been at the forefront of grassroots efforts to raise the minimum wage to $15 and improve working conditions during the pandemic. Now, they are undertaking more unionization efforts than this country has seen in decades, from Amazon to Starbucks and beyond to have dignity, fair pay, and security at work. No one should have to cobble together an income from two or three jobs working for companies raking in record profits.
It’s ironic to hear some of my colleagues’ defenses of the filibuster — that it promotes bipartisanship when it’s being used to prevent a bipartisan House-passed bill from getting a fair vote in the Senate.
[**Today, I’m asking you to join me in solidarity with workers across the country by demanding the Senate abolish the filibuster and pass the _PRO Act_. Add your name here:**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220501-filibuster-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220501-filibuster-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe)
---
This isn’t exactly a newsflash, but wealth and income inequality in the United States is spiraling out of control.
Last week, Elon Musk — the richest person on Earth — announced he would purchase Twitter for $44 billion. Jeff Bezos blasts off into space while, on the ground, Amazon workers are forced to work at a breakneck pace with some of the worst turnover rates in the country.
It’s time to stand up and fight back. President Biden has proven his pro-union bonafides, and if we can get this bill through the Senate, we can tilt the balance of power back towards working people after years of anti-worker legislation and attacks.
[**Are you with me, Derek? Add your name to my petition demanding Senate Democrats abolish the filibuster so we can pass vital legislation like the _PRO Act_.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220501-filibuster-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220501-filibuster-petition?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220501_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe)
---
Thanks for adding your name to stand with the millions of working people across our country. I’m grateful for your support.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=230%2E5257348%2E9O1Nxe)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---

name: Val Demings (personal story)
subject: never tire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I hope you'll give this email a read
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44808801/343177633/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3050-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGU1ZWViZS05MWM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RWApay_8cm05oXYRdcj2uknsI0GPyTSdE5nnLRfO9vw=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more before my midnight deadline to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44808802/343177634/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3050-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGU1ZWViZS05MWM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RWApay_8cm05oXYRdcj2uknsI0GPyTSdE5nnLRfO9vw=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can before my midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44808803/343177635/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3050-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGU1ZWViZS05MWM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RWApay_8cm05oXYRdcj2uknsI0GPyTSdE5nnLRfO9vw=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings

clean_body: I hope you'll give this email a read | | | Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career. = That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community. = Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. body:
| | | |

| _**EARLY VOTING BEGINS TOMORROW, MAY 2 FOR THE MAY 24 PRIMARY!

[FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION HERE.](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=fe70eead32&e=89fb4d5220)**_
_**TUNE IN TO DAVID'S THIRD DEBATE**_

Tonight, David Perdue will participate in his third debate before the primary election on May 24. We hope you're able to tune in!
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=385406095a&e=89fb4d5220)
**WHAT:** GOP Gubernatorial Debate hosted by the Atlanta Press Club

**WHEN:** Sunday, May 1 at 7:00 p.m.

**WHERE:** Airing live on Georgia Public Broadcasting. Streaming online [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=5f621f4979&e=89fb4d5220).
_In case you missed it, click[HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=38c318a778&e=89fb4d5220) to watch the first debate hosted by WSB-TV and [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=97aa972c9d&e=89fb4d5220) to watch the second debate hosted by WTOC-TV._
_**PRESIDENT TRUMP'S TELE-RALLY**_

Join President Trump and David Perdue for a special Georgia tele-rally on Monday, May 2. Simply dial 404-487-0954 at 6:30 PM to join the call.

_**CAMPAIGN STOPS**_

David will be making stops across Georgia next week to encourage folks to get out and vote. Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=d4c97c1de7&e=89fb4d5220) to find a full list of meet and greets.

These events are free and open to the public, so please invite your friends and family. We hope to see you!

name: HER Time
subject: Thank you, Peter 💗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YpLTt5ZXudOaf-QE-9-IVn_pvmlyc2CiRJKN0_X6jJk=/i456ME0Jstqdf81DClcn8Qh5TjYPDld8q9wFe9tRqj0=)
---
Women are constantly undervalued, undermined, and underappreciated. It's an endless cycle -- one we can only break out of by working together.
**That 's why I'm so glad to have you on the HER Time team. Because of you, we _exceeded _our April fundraising goal. That helps us elect more women to office than ever before (and keep them there!).**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YpLTt5ZXudOaf-QE-9-IVn_pvmlyc2CiRJKN0_X6jJk=/e2a90nf2tepGtlHZigSXJh67Nhsi2UbQflxe3zxFYD4=?refcode=X_050122_ThankYou)
---
Midterms are going to be tough this year. With Republicans doubling down on attacking reproductive freedom and LGBTQ rights, losing isn't an option.
Together, we can protect our Democratic Congresswomen and elect new, exciting candidates across the country.
[**Support women in office | _Chip in now_ >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YpLTt5ZXudOaf-QE-9-IVn_pvmlyc2CiRJKN0_X6jJk=/GC0J-3pwQNp2ydutspzGprDXUmjypWBckNMk1ikQGD4=?refcode=X_050122_ThankYou)
Thank you again!
-- _Katie Hill and the HER Time team_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YpLTt5ZXudOaf-QE-9-IVn_pvmlyc2CiRJKN0_X6jJk=/GC0J-3pwQNp2ydutspzGprDXUmjypWBckNMk1ikQGD4=?refcode=X_050122_ThankYou)
---

* * *
In 2018, Katie Hill beat the odds and flipped CA-25 blue for the first time in over two decades. Her message of systemic change resonated with voters, and though she's no longer in Congress, she's still fighting to make a difference. **After stepping down from her seat, Katie founded HER Time to help elect candidates like her: women who are overlooked and underestimated.** **You can help HER Time**[**support Democratic women up and down the ballot by donating now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YpLTt5ZXudOaf-QE-9-IVn_pvmlyc2CiRJKN0_X6jJk=/mmk2afSM1Hteo-aaPWNplVWX7H2nkaFWGe5fwVSaOWU=?refcode=footer)**, and**[**learn more about our mission here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YpLTt5ZXudOaf-QE-9-IVn_pvmlyc2CiRJKN0_X6jJk=/i456ME0Jstqdf81DClcn8Qh5TjYPDld8q9wFe9tRqj0=)**.** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:

---
YOU'VE BEEN HANDPICKED TO RESPOND ON BEHALF OF PA:
**HOW WOULD YOU RATE VICE PRESIDENT HARRIS' PERFORMANCE?**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44808979/343178846/-310534342?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk587-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmE5YTBhMi05NmM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-juEn4iy7eaXui_8G2u_Dr6G-Y4mdI74DxDMbZ7QZM=&emci=39fb73e7-e2c7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=36a9a0a2-96c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)
| | [SUBMIT YOUR RATING](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44808980/343178847/-310534342?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk587-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmE5YTBhMi05NmM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h-juEn4iy7eaXui_8G2u_Dr6G-Y4mdI74DxDMbZ7QZM=&emci=39fb73e7-e2c7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=36a9a0a2-96c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6085109)
---
Friend, Vice President Kamala Harris made history and broke barriers by becoming the first woman, first South Asian and first Black American to be elected vice president. But that was just the beginning.

Since taking office, Vice President Harris has worked tirelessly to defend our democracy, push for historic legislation and restore our global reputation through diplomacy.
**But the GOP _never_ wanted to see Harris elected, and they're doing everything in their power to block the Biden-Harris agenda. We need dedicated Democrats to fight back and defend our inspiring, impactful VP – but we still haven't heard from YOU. **

name: American Action News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlt7aa48jie8nuih9sdfpd3tsi4fa2apjis5v9bo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5gm0or4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbdr1e4rm4ctn6cp78ptmeoo73dthm8p37cjieqqjecj36domcpdl6djm6crhm3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor9cr2cup30phh6ipm6ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z359gi1hdortfpdijh219oleplt60t75h0s6o290_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5gm0or4cdh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv66gm4skur3977k1g3b7370i8i92caliotm799o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5gm0or4cdh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp54ips4l7c1b187ll3saijo5gd3mkugf6cv1gh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5gm0or4cdh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Morgan Harper
subject: There’s still time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
\--
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220501-1020-footer-ak&t=2&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)
Below is a special message from Morgan about the race and about what she has heard from voters while traveling across the state. With only 3 days until the polls close for the US Senate primary, we still have time to boost our investments in our ad and in our organizing program. If we raise $3,250 toward our digital goal today it will make a big difference in what we can do over the next 3 days. **[Can you chip in $25 or any amount to help us hit our goal?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33050?t=3&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)**
---
Hi,
It doesn’t feel like it was that long ago when we launched this campaign, determined to bring new leadership and a new progressive vision to Ohio. But it has been nearly a year, and every day since I’ve heard from people across the state that **they want to believe that change is possible and that we can elect leaders who really care about improving people’s lives.**
I am so inspired by the people I have spoken with throughout this campaign. People working to start a business, raise a family, pursue the career they always wanted, and give back to their communities. **Those voices and my own experience shaped this campaign – a campaign focused on hope, solutions, and a progressive vision to give power back to the people.**
**We have 3 days until the primary and my team and I are working hard to get out the vote – but there’s even more that we can do, with your help.** If we can raise $3,250 online today, we can make some critical investments in our GOTV efforts. I know how strong our movement is so I know we can do it. **[Will you chip in $25, $10 or any amount now to help us turn out the vote and keep fighting for progressive change in Ohio?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33050?t=4&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33056?refcode=em20220501-1020&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)**
Thank you,
Morgan
P.S. There is still time to volunteer too! **Our organizers and volunteers are working dawn til dusk to engage communities and get out the vote.** If you live in Ohio, or even if you don’t, we would love your help! **[Click here to sign up to volunteer.](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?t=24&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33050?t=25&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220501-1020-footer&t=26&refcode2=1020_90090_fbW2T5&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1020%2E90090%2EfbW2T5)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

body:
People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom and protect liberty? | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_t=L7PFGOsgcoA_dXv0U3TE7Ga0WP52YRb_sVV9Xf1aY_Klrs0aLX1tIp_Inx0tZeE8EB-BngxO6EV8FLHFa1o_G1--tFm6z6hPSX_XjfBFVZAIKudeePl7V2OTfnQzrH-u5MejzBA0tm3FUQKeD2z7TXnEJQqAR9NjVzVsAS8F9Nk%3D).

[
](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUNWJciJ50N6Z-dZc39scJHdaAA5-TlFEMkao97xcgqHhVdGzqAUu7SveKkoZVZpx_keXRcCfUuo1tut07iiHRtXQdrIiaTDfzV2TvgUVLI0odyL5WLLb-JQheJqL6y6BhDTIEAQADI_W--kByBJP1tcBFKyEgbrygxzTOsSzIE9n17iA5Jp9ZDQUohtrF7-KgWdPswJd5Rmkk4y2lvoCeMA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Fellow Conservative - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUiZBQ4_4-Ax_pdfaXatEXYJkTtRkQ-S2QGG-hxtIZxOEVSEQgfh6F5PwZ7oGsrhGmG93LKCVXlqBfDBWGOlEbDx2TqOTU78iVGMn-YtYgiBodRolv1aa5V9VgiJS_1r8Ultz3nZB2XKHnHAiLgrSla1zItOilEcdsD7S1BSVwIDU0zjoObkV7NQQEoa8iwAT1PyjjHiNzaT_wIDzkzjGyiQ%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUJec_29c5ZElc7W5CvCZuAW3GFv5cINHMwJxUEPbxqva1zaJlExRLs-dq7Mi1x9lr7hJhZcrDGgsdNEO-mn4qgposk5ZJBNedcd91Vkf01GkmFj9LDptEMpUxYWO4IKE4a0uwF3HxlsDSsgPLZPJnR9EUoakcav5QGSeqkMeBGReJDxzxnNzgA1sooL64iN7eZXMOjP3bYCRy1TfALJVLzQ%3D%3D)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUhiCqpHGpc6Tjdu188UdyY3v_fUCUCPjhx6TyhOQzVxht1aPNrt00jcEYxnnJ9SJ-1CToKzl6cqwIDgp_7gAO9JQINBbGTXMybY6sndN4UTePGBmFjUcc3Wv85X_ifkr8deHHMeFzAdmgVtvaDRc0wEG-hqVRYUVGbJhnK2SpIauK6yBInJ5-mFWvZdZMfATfq8qWnQUfUybVJ3gdELAk2w%3D%3D)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUAUhKtidYNzlrhcEI1KlOjIGhjZd9zYHygtgkaS_MjfhAUHpXbYCgx6QaSzPd8gPtLQdGCQWBCEERwXfkAt9zcU5TIxawj0-QIFSA9HEfPGoIcawsfBwEA0rc2Q43wKkQJW_fvrB5F1RlqoVzJaB3OHmumC2SmUQrRMFs1X2ngUp8HEjY4giD9DhTs6hQkWqUmnjtsedEALHjjSBFAS9h5g%3D%3D)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUvmOxc5zeNVQ2XdBHfeVgrWpcqe8OGsJ71V-DZybPmwASpIDjDe-FBIRg8p5Z90u0gd-nQV_lX9XL_U_O1y1JZVAOiG4I9hG0LtBw0l7nqej0FR9cCRBarANznNPHbTzO3XyEpnpu11po83hSBlM5J_IGDEiXqbp6JxIT9DOrJnhKOdbiP_sG6Ixz59JQWts-3GZQtuBOQtuzVxIFNktjVQ%3D%3D)

For Freedom,
Leora Levy

P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, [**tap the secure link to watch now.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=72aa7cad9ccc4c69a22abc68003e5f3b&_e=rllZ6JhCH5pOPnIRIDYgUTlCP_paL0sQ8l6i595UdTLO1U57zDSb9Z2l__bt0sAVKK66BIMQaZy1Bj3u-9ZOa8JNMlx1BYoXdLhXIo9sFE8XaM8e1WDUJ7Hzqubtpo_w9-vaHVj5YW7AEOyTcbtTibkmQkITvREvLLDhBdMNa5fMQPkEommG5ZzEvW6G17KCFhUd6HJgH1nZioiqXUDyxWxLxwqbDMfyrh9VTZ0Mp3ovt6AUGITQs3m-elKniAYUAX-AVa59Avd245T0lXTZvT5bX1SH_WC41ZdWwqQuTsLt4mJHppNYnQKFU0EGarjhNYnpUWtorrhJUZXXLqL5FOE2egJVZmHxH6PLeUOvVtJZ8MNVLp8bSaj1-gxXUu0m2-nqHwffBB2fjNdytUqN4fW3ZqzBXm8PDJqzzG4nSL0aDviCZ6SQl649-YR0JbBtXS0BrJDUkL8nmY_S0oFjvA%3D%3D)

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

---

| | | Friend, **__** In case you didn’t see the message, there’s a big goal coming up for us on the campaign trail here in New Hampshire. The mission to elect to the U.S. Senate small business owner Chuck Morse - _the ONLY candidate who the polls show can beat Ivy League lawyer Maggie Hassan this November_ \- is facing a critical End-of-April fundraising deadline at midnight tonight... **...and as of right now, we are BEHIND our budget by exactly $1,058**. _If we can’t correct the course before midnight, we’re going to MISS this goal, and Hassan and her powerful D.C. allies will most definitely pull far ahead!_ **We don’t want to have to tell Chuck that at a critical moment, we failed to do the bare minimum to stand up for the 603 in the face of a radical, progressive Washington agenda that’s holding back our state and country.** So we have to ask one final time before we step into an important finance meeting with Chuck in a few hours - [can you rush in one final time to reach this goal and help bring the 603 Way to D.C. this November?](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTQwNzA5Nzk1MjE2NDk2NzQ5JmM9dTJwNiZlPTAmYj05NjM3NTY1NTImZD12NG85dTBq.gIa5AV3Jt4B9u7zKVH1Ivrihq5XFqdjT5cf3s3W9F1Y)****

Thank you for this urgent support, Chuck Morse Finance Team | | | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Friends of Chuck Morse PO Box 106, North Salem NH 03073 United States

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: Will you please take our May issues survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It only takes a minute or two!
#

From day one of this campaign, Cheri has made hearing directly from people a top priority.
We want to hear what’s on your mind today. What are the issues that you care most about?
**[Will you take our May issues survey and share your perspective with Cheri? It only takes a minute or two, but it makes a real difference for our campaign.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/may_issues_em?source=em220501-1-t1&refcode2=810.357359.rJRFOE&t=1&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/may_issues_em?source=em220501-1-t1&refcode2=810.357359.rJRFOE&t=2&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE)**
People are struggling right now, and Washington is not listening. Too many out-of-touch politicians are putting their own needs and the needs of corporate special interests above the people.
That needs to change. Cheri’s focus is on hearing from the people and what they need — and that tells you exactly what kind of Senator she is going to be.
**[Please make your voice heard by taking our May issues survey today. With early voting underway and our organizing operation ramping up, we are trying to hear from as many people as possible. So your input will mean a lot.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/may_issues_em?source=em220501-1-t1&refcode2=810.357359.rJRFOE&t=3&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/may_issues_em?source=em220501-1-t1&refcode2=810.357359.rJRFOE&t=4&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE)**
Thank you and have a great day!
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=810_357359_rJRFOE&akid=810%2E357359%2ErJRFOE) today to help us make history.
