Sen. Grassley has been in Congress for nearly half a century – and in that time, he’s forgotten Iowans. Instead, he's chosen to push his extremist agenda and serve as Mitch McConnell's loyal henchman.
Iowans are sick and tired of his lousy performance – and they're ready to send him to the principal's office. **N****early two-thirds of voters said they didn't want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and now new data shows he's facing record-low approval ratings.**
It's time to give Iowans the leadership they deserve and flip this seat blue. Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to do just that, but she needs to know if grassroots supporters have her back.
**Please, before our live poll closes at midnight tonight, respond to show Abby you're with her! We need to hear from another 17 people from 18326 before 11:59 p.m. – so submit your response now!**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Will you do me a quick favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Our Republican Party nominee will be selected on May 21st - will you forward this email to a few friends and make sure that they know where to vote? |
---
| | , will you do me a quick favor?

On May 21st the Republican Party will be selecting our nominee to go against Jennifer Wexton this November. However, the nominee is being selected through a party run process that looks very different from a typical primary.

I want to be sure that everyone knows how and where to vote, so I'm asking that you forward this email to 5-10 friends who live in the 10th district and make sure that they have all the voting information.
---
|
---
|
_**Election Day on May 21st, 9am-4pm**_
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County : **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County : **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=ccc89fc707&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County :** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

_**Early Absentee Voting**_
Early absentee voting will be available on Thursday May 12th from 4pm-8pm. The ONLY location for early voting is the Middleburg Barn, located at 23320 Foxchase Farm Lane, Middleburg.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com and we can help you determine where to vote.

---
|
Thank you for taking the time to help your friends be informed about the upcoming election! I'm grateful for your support, and I'm counting on you to help us defeat Jennifer Wexton this November.

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District
---
|
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=66baea5e48&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")

Lawson for CongressP.O Box 1153Haymarket, VA 20168

name: Team Foushee
subject: A photo dump from the field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is devastating.
_We fell short of our goal last night by just a few contributions -- and we never got one from your zip code!_
But we're giving everyone on this list a second chance. [**Because this is so important, we 're offering you a one-time 300% match on ANY contributions you make within the next 4 hours.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275996:64IaBHoNr:m:1:3253819041:B322BF6B0033D1F397D352D39AAFD06C:r)
**[LAST CALL: GET 300% MATCHED >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275996:64IaBHoNr:m:1:3253819041:B322BF6B0033D1F397D352D39AAFD06C:r)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
Sender: Steve Scalise
Subject: won't ask for another PENNY from you
Peter, it's Steve Scalise and I'm going to level with you right now: **if every single Republican reading this email gave our average grassroots contribution of just $23 before our midnight deadline, I wouldn 't have to ask you for another PENNY _ever again_ to fund our red wave.**
Look, I know you may get hundreds of emails each month asking for the spare change in your pocket -- [**but here 's why your contribution of just $23 (or whatever you can spare) goes so much further today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275997:64IaBHoNr:m:1:3253819041:B322BF6B0033D1F397D352D39AAFD06C:r)
As the Republican Whip, I've worked with my colleagues to shut down Nancy Pelosi's political career, turn the lights off on the Radical Left movement, and stop Joe Biden's Socialist agenda in its tracks. **Republicans in Congress have accomplished a lot this year, but it was ONLY because of donors like yourself stepping up when I needed you most.**
Republicans have a once-in-a-century chance to win back the House with historic margins and shut down Joe Biden's agenda for the rest of his Presidency._That's why I need you with me on this._
[**Chip in Just $23 to Take Back the House >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275997:64IaBHoNr:m:1:3253819041:B322BF6B0033D1F397D352D39AAFD06C:r)
**My promise to you today is this:** if you -- and every Republican reading this email -- makes a $23 contribution before closing out of this email, we'll be able to fully fund ALL our campaign operations in every single battleground race in America.
_**And it might even be enough to get President Trump to run again ...**_
[**Chip in just $23 right now so I can fulfill my promise to you and save America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60275997:64IaBHoNr:m:1:3253819041:B322BF6B0033D1F397D352D39AAFD06C:r)
Thank you for your continued support. I can't wait to see what else you and I will accomplish this year while working together.
Best,
Steve Scalise
Republican Whip

name: Eric Jones
subject: Vote this Tuesday!!
body:
Hello Everyone!

I wanted to remind you that election day is set for this Tuesday, May 3rd.

Ohio is a closed primary state, which means you have to request a
Democratic ballot in order to see my name.

Many of you may have heard of the conflicts with redistricting. That means
state legislators will be elected later this year, but national candidates
like myself, statewide and country candidates will still appear on the
ballot.

So let's work together on May 3rd to bring some much-needed breathing room
back to regular families across our country!

Thank you for your support!
Eric S. Jones
VoteEricjones.com

Reply "Unsubscribe" to this email to no longer see these in the future

---

| "Hi! I'm letting you know I voted for you last Saturday. Your daughter's speech was the best item of the entire day. I believe you will be elected and that you're the best choice. How may I help?"

| Thank you all for the continued support and encouragement!

Sincerely,

name: Herschel Walker
subject: “A white insult to Black people”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. |
---
_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**
--Eli Mystal, MSNBC_

Fellow American,

I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in _The Nation_.

The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line:

_"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."_
Well, Fellow American, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings.

He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said:

_"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."_
**That's racist, disgusting, and sad.**

I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far.

**You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment.**

We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. **[Can I count on you to help me today?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b1e200312be1475fa49ffc27a4357af0&_e=dPHQMd0wQ7-qc73XlmtP3yTWtechzseVIJjkUq3GksUPSKLnP8J0nfDeOCAiUQgMQv7L0bXW0qtaU_AKl9Qu6jeQi-UqtsL9LnIRh_j8ukXfgbsmVz_rLymWmnZLHHgeNQ1B5fUpEukyDXblQYSQkprfUhbciZh5vUB4lhM-4d2UXkqZ9g9uzdoVxMCTsFc0QFRSpbPFQiYruV-TxQHK9xdvvlexH7xfFGEAVrH4bLWqKKQcBtCPcIzTdv-H39BglxFRkpl7YJfgNYbcYJUf3o2bNGWsFlMVGc5DQxxobLq5b66lZTMQeO1r8cPwkKo0oakeDm88Y64IZ3BqH7mc0r6oOPguSevBpEbaFcQc95egJrgHkNmjRP2izcUgQcJs1LLpEWnjajUcbAR8i37k6fvPqi1sLdVAmZCscLQe-z6UJzmm4fDf1Q-Gm889oQEV94Y6K6il7M19Vg0oOOS9qCszeqfG3NYB683hqAH46Uk%3D)**

_Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air._

**I won't be quiet about this.** This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b1e200312be1475fa49ffc27a4357af0&_e=dPHQMd0wQ7-qc73XlmtP3yTWtechzseVIJjkUq3GksUPSKLnP8J0nfDeOCAiUQgMQv7L0bXW0qtaU_AKl9Qu6jeQi-UqtsL9LnIRh_j8ukXfgbsmVz_rLymWmnZLHHgeNQ1B5fUpEukyDXblQYSQkprfUhbciZh5vUB4lhM-4d2UXkqZ9g9uzdoVxMCTsFc0QFRSpbPFQiYruV-TxQHK9xdvvlexH7xfFGEAVrH4bLWqKKQcBtCPcIzTdv-H39BglxFRkpl7YJfgNYbcYJUf3pAn_qdoyovnHvNFjUeoOG4Y4oNCsm95O3Uu5f0Ko6uLc2Z1rFcsh6DLs9TQ4QoRL2VjlRiC7Q2Fv-NjUour0OOjJ3Rxr8cuepUxrChaYQjX_C5ppSVLRR4kKnx7myFkmECr5dthh0w-iVNb9UYTh4_i1lrxig2fIr1Pi4jEss2aHzqEa1krvvRPb7gQddRskD_nYgs7_ttyEP3y77x-ozg%3D)**

Thanks,

name: Dylan McArthur
subject: I’m reaching out to you directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
I could really use your help right now.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44810177/343184560/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220501Real_EOM_DM_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTk4YzRkZS1hNmM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LHcbLl1_Dkc8SnKcs_iE2scL0d1dJSzUfbFzKkb_44I=)
Team –

The weekend is coming to a close, and to be honest, the reporting deadline tomorrow is looming pretty large over Team MTO. Don’t get me wrong, the amount of support we’ve seen over the past few days has been a boon at the end of every long day out in the field.

**But with only a day left and $3,743 to raise, I wanted to reach out to you directly for help.**
[**_The fact is, our democracy is on the line this year. We need to be able to show that we have enough grassroots support to carry us through this election and fight off attacks from those who would put their party over the people. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Happy May Day!

body:
There is power in a union | | | Hi there, [**I am the labor candidate for Congress in WA-06, and I will always fight for workers over corporations. Chip in a small donation now to help me win, so I can fight for workers in Congress!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44810559/343198333/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTliNGM3NS1iMGM5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3PWqMJQQUIeCipOtdZYZPR_1xB3oYpdf5n6gomiTfRs=) Today is May Day, when we celebrate the struggles and achievements of workers’ movements across the world. Thanks to unions, we have child labor laws, a weekend, an 8-hour workday, and much more. But we still have a long way to go. The federal minimum wage hasn’t been raised in over a decade and still sits at $7.25, even though $30 per hour is the bare-minimum living wage across the country. I am the only candidate in this race — and the first Congressional candidate in the country — to call for a $30 minimum wage. I also support the PRO Act, which would make it easier to organize unions and negotiate first contracts. My pro-labor stance resulted in Data for Progress ranking me as one of the top 5 most pro-labor Congressional candidates in the country in my last election. By supporting my campaign for Congress at this link, you’re supporting unions and workers across the country: name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeremy=20Munson?=
subject: Congresswoman Michele Bachmann ENDORSED Jeremy Munson for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
body:
Representative Bachmann served as one of the strongest pro-life voices in Washington, fiercely defending the lives of the unborn. She was also a leade | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jeremymunson/breaking-i-am-running-for-congress-in-minnesotas-1st-district-9013025?e=f4c2e54596)
---
|
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=9b8ffb7dce&e=f4c2e54596)
Peter,Former Minnesota Congresswoman Michele Bachmann has endorsed my campaign, and I am honored to have her support!Representative Bachmann served as one of the strongest pro-life voices in Washington, fiercely defending the lives of the unborn. She was also a leader in the Tea Party movement to stop reckless spending and repeal Obamacare and Dodd-Frank.
|
---
|
---
[](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=41d60bbfbe&e=f4c2e54596)
_"It is time to send SPINE back to Washington! That is why I am standing with Jeremy Munson for the MN First District Congressional Seat. DC is not for babies. It takes a person who will stand for what is right against liberals, RINOs, and big government and not back down. I endorse Jeremy Munson, the person that the First district needs to protect the minds, and bodies of our children and the freedom and sovereignty of our Nation."_ \- Michele Bachmann
|
---
Our campaign has several full-time, young activists going door to door, driving farm-site to farm site, all across the 21 county district, and talking to voters about our platform. Thirteen thousand mail-in ballots have just arrived at district homes. We need to raise $15,000 to finance this doorknocking program - that means if 100 people donate $150, we can win this election at the doors!
[**Please help our campaign with your generous grassroots donation of $150 to fund our door knockers.**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=31ef9684d4&e=f4c2e54596)
Instead of donating money, if you would like to donate a day or a few hours going door-to-door talking with voters, please visit [jeremymunson.com/volunteer](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=20cc11c2e9&e=f4c2e54596) to sign up. If you live outside the district and want to help make phone calls to primary voters - you can volunteer your time using the same link.I am running a grassroots campaign for Congress to restore fiscal sanity to Washington and to be a strong voice for the voiceless. If you are legally dead when your heart stops beating, you are legally alive when your heart starts. As a state representative, I co-authored the Heartbeat Bill for that very reason.I consistently vote to defend life and never voted to fund Planned Parenthood, earning me a perfect 100% score with Minnesota Citizens Concerned for Life.
For Liberty,
Jeremy Munson
Candidate for Congress
Personal cell: (507) 200-8448
| [Paid for by Munson for Congress]()
---
|
---
| | | | [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=d6c52f16da&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=7359feab02&e=f4c2e54596)| [](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=062ba16f8c&e=f4c2e54596)
---|---|---

Our mailing address is:
Munson for CongressPO Box 188Lake Crystal, MN 56055-4486
[Add us to your address book](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f&e=f4c2e54596&c=7bb8b3547c) or [unsubscribe](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=279701027f&e=f4c2e54596&c=7bb8b3547c)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: MSNBC: I’m a “token” Black Republican
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. |
---
_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**
--Eli Mystal, MSNBC_

Fellow American,

I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in _The Nation_.

The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line:

_"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."_
Well, Fellow American, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings.

He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said:

_"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."_
**That's racist, disgusting, and sad.**

I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far.

**You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment.**

We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. **[Can I count on you to help me today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f232fc9057b8405cb976243935f8bdf0&_e=R6w1uI8IubiybGK6r7I4FgJZLb5kx7iT6LwM6VizpxJVdsHLh4MJZCzQGzYRVaKoKz4h1R8wkJJnUGPmItFT96EBhbC0igmfTYWQt9Jacl6XGEIbXRaGO61JV9lrLmgQG7d_QhCxDSd46lIEm4BQGQDQFNmaaCUQVXsBkhG0OM_x8BCAXl-4AVnyDjDARSBD1yn_J1toj2zzEWLWzDF3aCg4AdDpIMERlL5kGn84OPLN7_VhC1MZSRZH8PVRCQV2oSmGdXOfHWb8szkTZRXm4SSS11SStwsxbVtPUsrWu5dGyectmh0AosXDU978Up4LrSHMU0BlzK4Pi0Jn1ZDNhF9xsCf2Y-fKMYvYYDTFwPjLk5r_E3a-r1MZ7DFHM_o0EjvW_v9MlSAY-71xBX3SZvYXn0BBmWA-7DPyezeaIBIrMGXgzpWbIqPM9rp7R2Y0ivxrLLJ49peXg-v2EecHX0t_bnGO76I98J2UqUF2_IcVngLrQpcp9cfvA7cxoEGV)**

_Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air._

**I won't be quiet about this.** This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f232fc9057b8405cb976243935f8bdf0&_e=R6w1uI8IubiybGK6r7I4FgJZLb5kx7iT6LwM6VizpxJVdsHLh4MJZCzQGzYRVaKoKz4h1R8wkJJnUGPmItFT96EBhbC0igmfTYWQt9Jacl6XGEIbXRaGO61JV9lrLmgQG7d_QhCxDSd46lIEm4BQGQDQFNmaaCUQVXsBkhG0OM_x8BCAXl-4AVnyDjDARSBD1yn_J1toj2zzEWLWzDF3aCg4AdDpIMERlL5kGn84OPLN7_VhC1MZSRZH8PVRCQV2oSmGdXOfHWb8szkTZRXm4XDF3nN7Tw5KG48LMTclNwl1pqSTh0Qqvrk5kc-pdtGZa25Hm6ZhSOdrezlg5lst5C4YicDvT3VZctUDV5RXapSBfN29puK85klxEgV8e0gVdfAaXZzlxhCx-Jb-sCGQbKFUJ79huaV6vn_7s50W8WCiZ5DbVSr05n4XnLDZbHdJmLxBYs5GrYMetQkerFY0h741JKIzBXkibmvQP_gpXMnc5zWiax5-TtYCx5q4m779)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f232fc9057b8405cb976243935f8bdf0&_e=R6w1uI8IubiybGK6r7I4FgJZLb5kx7iT6LwM6VizpxJVdsHLh4MJZCzQGzYRVaKoKz4h1R8wkJJnUGPmItFT96EBhbC0igmfTYWQt9Jacl6XGEIbXRaGO61JV9lrLmgQG7d_QhCxDSd46lIEm4BQGQDQFNmaaCUQVXsBkhG0OM_x8BCAXl-4AVnyDjDARSBD1yn_J1toj2zzEWLWzDF3aCg4AdDpIMERlL5kGn84OPLN7_VhC1MZSRZH8PVRCQV2oSmGdXOfHWb8szkTZRXm4dQTg9RW8wthIMSFpajCi-FKwacAnH9O8OFuQhlz5JFLznnrOG0e8DTBTFWeM7cqtOe2w6GrL55EW9SgFHHAEigsNiVe7BUXcDHVzbp1zwVilqx9oyZOmvf7Em7AgRGapH_kZaAYox49Qcm8qZY_uNGhYbTV7IJoev5nf3oiZw4wE8sR8zZ1_rdufgXuEYZSDJP7XkPH6CHjcJc4AjOAPBkg-K-SUcGjYaY-NDxfNh8Q)

clean_body: MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. | "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." --Eli Mystal, MSNBC Fellow American, I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in The Nation. The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line: "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." Well, Fellow American, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." That's racist, disgusting, and sad. I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far. You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment. We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air. I won't be quiet about this. This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Another Blow to the Establishment
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=another_blow_to_establishment&n=1)
---
## Another Blow to the Establishment
### Sunday, May 1st, 2022
Friend, You know as well as I do that the Republican Establishment would like nothing more than for you and me to go away. But their wishes aren't coming true. In fact, our **pro-freedom candidates are winning**! On Thursday, our former Olmsted County Action 4 Liberty lead organizer won the GOP Endorsement for House District 25A. Wendy Phillips is a real patriot and I can't wait to see her serve us in St Paul. Yesterday, medical freedom champ Bill Lieske won the GOP Endorsement for Senate District 58 against a double mask wearing, Republican Establishment backed candidate. This is a HUGE win! **It's great that these two pro-freedom candidates won because just this past Friday, nearly every Republican in the Legislature voted for the unconstitutional, multi-subject Frontline Workers pay bill that spent $1.1 Billion of your surplus and gives money to Walz' public COVID vaccine program. **
## [SEE THE VOTE](https://www.action4liberty.com/gop_and_democrats_spend_your_surplus_money?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=another_blow_to_establishment&n=2)
Only one legislator in Minnesota has REFUSED to spend a penny of your surplus money - Rep Erik Mortensen. He's also the top ranked legislator on our [2021 Scorecard](https://www.action4liberty.com/scorecard?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=another_blow_to_establishment&n=3). With all the endorsement victories this year, it looks like many more patriots will be joining Rep Erik Mortensen in St Paul soon!
## **Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=another_blow_to_establishment&n=4 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=another_blow_to_establishment&n=4)

name: Lukas Severson
subject: Team Benda Campaign Update
body:
Dear Team Benda,

We are 3 weeks until the primary election day May 24. Every vote is going to count and we need your help getting out the vote! Early voting is open now and we are encouraging everyone to go vote now! We are also asking for your help as we race to the finish, attached is a google form with volunteer opportunities and different ways you can help. Any way that you can help is welcomed.

Thank you!

<https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScBHnqjY2NtZAFiI_bMMRl_aTxEbXRzpkL_fQc6bMnVOZaFJQ/viewform?usp=sf_link>

\--

Lukas Severson
Campaign Manager
Benda For Congress
(507) 508-3148

Happy International Workers Day, Peter! As we head into the midterm election season, we must elect leaders committed to improving workers' lives. That means living wages, paid parental leave, unconditional healthcare, and free education, whether it be college or trade schools. I believe in paying people a living wage and treating them fairly. This is why every single piece of distributed campaign material has been Union made right here in our district. Every item has a Union Bug proudly displayed. Incumbent Rep Jaime Herrera Beutler is predictably anti-worker. Even as the COVID-19 pandemic brought the inequities that workers face into stark focus, and millions of our fellow Americans were bearing the brunt of the economic devastation of the pandemic, Jaime and the GOP left workers out in the cold. Along with the rest of the House GOP, she voted against the PRO Act, legislation that would restore some fairness to the economy by strengthening the federal laws by protecting workers' rights to unionize. Right now, too many companies treat workers like cogs in a machine, trading the lives of their employees for profit. Members of Congress must guarantee that workers are able to negotiate for fair treatment. I stand in solidarity with striking workers across the country who are demanding better working conditions and fair pay for their hard work. And in the House of Representatives, you can count on me to continue fighting for legislation like the PRO Act to protect organizers' rights. Let's #FlipWA03! -Brent \-- Brent Hennrich Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-03
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins for Congress Campaign Update Week 17
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Brice Wiggins for Congress
body:
From the Pinebelt to the Coast, I invite you to keep up with us along the campaign trail. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bricewiggins/campaign-updates-8961045?e=698f056321)
---
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5998603a44&e=698f056321)
Hello, I’m Brice Wiggins, and I am running for Congress in the Republican Primary Election on **June 7th** to represent the people of South Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in Washington D.C.Our campaign to clean up D.C. won’t be easy, but I know how to win a tough fight. I’ve done it on the sports field, I’ve done it in the courtroom and I’ve done it in the Mississippi legislature. I’m ready for the next fight in the U.S. House of Representatives–and I am ready to show up for Mississippi, in person. You can learn more about me, my record, and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=6fc9488e10&e=698f056321). As we inch closer to election day, **June 7th,** I’m going to every corner of South Mississippi to earn your vote - building on the momentum of our accomplishments in the legislative session. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=eb7544db30&e=698f056321) for details on my involvement in these accomplishments including my vote and activism for the Largest Tax Cut and Teacher Pay Raise in Mississippi history.
|
---
_**"If your actions inspire others to dream more, learn more, do more and become more, you are a leader."**__**—John Quincy Adams**_
|
---
# Campaign Trail Highlights
## First Congressional Debate
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c066d1a2ef&e=698f056321)
View the video above to hear my closing statement from our first Congressional Debate - South Mississippi deserves to have a [**bold and unafraid**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=11565eb9ee&e=698f056321) fighter in DC who will show up and get this country back on track. Vote Wiggins on June 7th!
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=86f5304ed0&e=698f056321)
---
|
# Walkin’ with Wiggins
Taking Grassroots campaigning to heart by coming to a neighborhood near you! [**#WalkinWithWiggins**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2962b61f23&e=698f056321) is going door to door from the Pinebelt to the Coast to earn your vote on June 7th.[**WATCH HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2c0899f571&e=698f056321) to see where we’ve been and other highlights from this past week below.
---
## Dr. Ben Carson Scholarship Dinner
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=009c667dd9&e=698f056321)
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=eedf8435da&e=698f056321)
---
Thank you, [**Dr. Ben Carson**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=89b0e30a9f&e=698f056321) , for the inspirational speech and your heartfelt mission at William Carey University and MOMA - Mississippi Osteopathic Medical Association. Congratulations to all the future scholars who will benefit from the Carson Scholarship Fund's wonderful opportunities!
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=33d150350b&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Rocking the Pinebelt!
This weekend, we spent time from [**Hattiesburg to Stone County**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=cca8f35ed6&e=698f056321) , getting to know the people and sharing my vision for South Mississippi._Contrary to the incumbent in this race, in-person is the only way I know how to do it; you won’t see us posting on social media that I was somewhere when I wasn’t._
---
| | | | | |
## Standing Up For Veterans
At Hattiesburg’s Live at Five H'Burg, I met with Soldiers for Freedom Outdoors, a local husband and wife of a national non-profit that assists veterans in coping with PTSD. I shared with them my commitment to attacking the problem of suicide among veterans. [**Learn more** **HERE.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8dea965ad8&e=698f056321)
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=cc1dd81bc2&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2475d3696f&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Women of UMC Eastlawn
Without the freedom to worship, we have nothing. I was reminded of this while speaking with the women of [**Eastlawn United Methodist Church**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1c96b91a76&e=698f056321). 🙏
---
| | | | | |
## One Coast Awards
The [**Taggart, Rimes & Wiggins, PLLC**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c202dc28b5&e=698f056321)**** Team came out to support our very own Cherie Wade & other community leaders we are proud to call friends at the [**One Coast Awards**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=820ffd45e9&e=698f056321)**.** Cherie is one of the Coast’s rising stars & we’re thrilled she joined our team!
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=91dd06bcd2&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c3740a4786&e=698f056321)
---
|
## Remembering Carl
Carl, thank you for your dedicated service to the city of Ocean Springs. You always reminded us to stay humble and were a [**true testament**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c1272f4f1b&e=698f056321) to our culture as the Hospitality State. What happened is unacceptable and is why I authored [**Buddy’s Law**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d87d2754d9&e=698f056321) to hopefully stop animal cruelty once and for all. #JusticeForCarl
---
|
---
# IN THE MEDIA
## Congressional Interview with Shea Dobson
[](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c3d9afd7c5&e=698f056321)
| | | | | |
# Early Learning Win!
Eight years ago, Mississippi was close to last in early education. Tired of it, I authored our Early Learning Collaborative Act. Now, we are one of [**ONLY**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=ac06840143&e=698f056321) five states to meet all ten quality measures. Getting things done matters, and is why you elect us, after all. It takes a team, and together, we made it happen.
---
| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3bfce514e9&e=698f056321)
---
| | | | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=15454aa62d&e=698f056321)
---
|
# Fighting Corruption
This week, the Governor signed a bill I authored into law requiring Dept. of Human Services investigators to [**report fraud**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=dcfc7faf83&e=698f056321) to the State Auditor.
---
|
---
## Final note...
As a leader, serving others and taking action to create real change that positively impacts the people I am elected to represent is my mission. Mississippi, I’m ready to work for you and with you to build a nation we can once again be proud of.I hope you will consider my passion and strong record of getting things as I ask for your vote and support on June 7.Join us in Biloxi this Thursday, April 28 - Brice Wiggins For Congress Fundraiser [**info here.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d72fb41037&e=698f056321)
|
---
## Primary Election Voting Information
### The Primary Election is on June 7.
Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=87462ba4a4&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details.
### Are you registered to vote? Find out [HERE](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=2447b4508c&e=698f056321).
If not, no worries. You have until May 9th to register to vote either in person or by mail. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8b8e0b8310&e=698f056321) to download a voter registration application. If you choose to mail in your voter registration application to the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence, be sure it is postmarked before May 9th (30 days before the election).
### Out of town on June 7th?
IN-PERSON ABSENTEE VOTING - Visit your [**County Circuit Clerk’s Office**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=3b9e7cea14&e=698f056321) to absentee vote in person from April 23 to June 4.MAIL-IN ABSENTEE VOTING - Contact the Circuit Clerk’s Office located in the county of your residence and request an Official Application for Absentee Elector’s Ballot be mailed to you. The Application and Ballot may be mailed together depending on how close to the election date is when the ballot is requested.*Mail-in absentee ballots must be postmarked on or before Election Day and received on or within five (5) business days of the election, June 14th, for them to count.[**Click HERE for a step-by-step guide for Absentee Voting.**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=604618d8f9&e=698f056321)
|
---
Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=be0acfac30&e=698f056321)

I’ve done it on the sports field, I’ve done it in the courtroom and I’ve done it in the Mississippi legislature. I’m ready for the next fight in the U.S. House of Representatives–and I am ready to show up for Mississippi, in person. You can learn more about me, my record, and my campaign . name: Laurie Teper
subject: Counting down to May 17!
body:
**Happy May everyone!**
**
**
**We wouldn 't be here without your support! So...thank you!**
**Courtney and YOU, her team, have worked hard to get to this point. The fruit of our labor will be a WIN ON MAY 17TH if we don't quit now!**
**
**
**Please, this is the time that we need you most!**
Sign up to volunteer at the polls handing out Courtney Geels palm cards. We need to fill slots FIRST on May 17, then May 14 and May 13 in all 5 counties: Alamance, Durham, Person, Granville and Orange. Please consider any time the polls are open. Can you give 2-3 hours of your time?? Ask retired friends, neighbors and family to help! Anyone who has extra time and is available to be at the polls prior to May 13 is encouraged to do so as well.

**Democracy works best when everyone participates!**
**Send me your availability and I will plug you in. If you need a t-shirt, let me know your size. You will be able to pick up supplies and a shirt before you are at the polls.**

**
**
**This Saturday, May 7 we are Door Knocking in Orange County from 9:00-12:00. The meeting location will be determined this week. Look for another email on Wednesday or Thursday. It is important to sign up for planning purposes so please sign up HERE:**

<https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>

Please spread the word for volunteers and send them my way!

Follow us on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/courtneygeels), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/courtneygeels/), and give us a like on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CourtneyGeelsForCongress) to keep up with Courtney.

Be sure to like and share!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__

Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: John Fetterman
subject: the Union Way of Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
My commitment to the union way of life is absolute — even if it puts me at odds with my own party, and no matter how it polls.
#
Derek,
I wanted to take a moment to talk about the importance of today, International Workers’ Day.
But first, I gotta show you this amazing banner made by Steelworkers in the Lehigh Valley:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220501?refcode=em20220501-5619&refcode2=5619_434096_x_nUDR&akid=5619%2E434096%2Ex_nUDR)
**It’s a *big* sign. Might even be taller than me. 😳**
Okay, now onto what I *really* want to talk about today.
**International Workers’ Day is a day to recognize the continued struggle of working people.** Weekends, the eight hour workday, benefits — we have all that thanks to unions + the centuries-long labor movement that built this nation.
My commitment to the union way of life is absolute. I always have and always will stand with all of the union workers in Pennsylvania, even when others turn their backs on them.
We are in an exciting time for workers’ rights, from the unionization of coffee shops across the country (including the Bloomfield Starbucks in Pittsburgh + the five Coffee Tree Roasters across Allegheny County!!!) to increased support of a much-needed minimum wage increase.
But we are also facing unprecedented attacks on workers + the right to form a union. We must support our unions and pass the PRO Act — a crucial piece of legislation to put power back into the hands of workers, strengthen our unions, and expand the union way of life for all workers across America.
**When you send me to the Senate this November, I promise you I will be the 51st Democratic vote to pass the PRO Act and other necessary legislation to support workers across PA + the country.**
**[If you can, please consider chipping in to support my campaign so I can continue to support the Union way of life and fight for working families.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220501?refcode=em20220501-5619&refcode2=5619_434096_x_nUDR&akid=5619%2E434096%2Ex_nUDR)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220501?amount=5&refcode=em20220501-5619&refcode2=5619_434096_x_nUDR&akid=5619%2E434096%2Ex_nUDR)**
Solidarity forever, Derek. ✊
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. THANK YOU!!!!! Because of the support of grassroots donors like you, we were able to meet our April end-of-month goal. **So let me say one more time: Thank you, Derek.**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220501-5619-footer&t=1&refcode2=5619_434096_x_nUDR&akid=5619%2E434096%2Ex_nUDR)**

clean_body: My commitment to the union way of life is absolute — even if it puts me at odds with my own party, and no matter how it polls. Derek, I wanted to take a moment to talk about the importance of today, International Workers’ Day. But first, I gotta show you this amazing banner made by Steelworkers in the Lehigh Valley: It’s a big sign. Might even be taller than me. 😳 Okay, now onto what I really want to talk about today. International Workers’ Day is a day to recognize the continued struggle of working people. Weekends, the eight hour workday, benefits — we have all that thanks to unions + the centuries-long labor movement that built this nation. My commitment to the union way of life is absolute. I always have and always will stand with all of the union workers in Pennsylvania, even when others turn their backs on them. We are in an exciting time for workers’ rights, from the unionization of coffee shops across the country (including the Bloomfield Starbucks in Pittsburgh + the five Coffee Tree Roasters across Allegheny County!!!) to increased support of a much-needed minimum wage increase. But we are also facing unprecedented attacks on workers + the right to form a union. We must support our unions and pass the PRO Act — a crucial piece of legislation to put power back into the hands of workers, strengthen our unions, and expand the union way of life for all workers across America. When you send me to the Senate this November, I promise you I will be the 51st Democratic vote to pass the PRO Act and other necessary legislation to support workers across PA + the country. Solidarity forever, Derek. ✊ John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. THANK YOU!!!!! Because of the support of grassroots donors like you, we were able to meet our April end-of-month goal. So let me say one more time: Thank you, Derek. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

# Join Ed for Cinco de Mayo
_**Hola!**_ Celebrate Cinco de Mayo with Ed Thelander for Congress at the Patio at 1578. Enjoy complimentary Mexican hors d’oeuvres and margaritas at the cash bar. Cinco de Mayo commemorates Mexico’s victory over the French Empire at the Battle of Puebla in 1862. This November 2022 will commemorate Ed’s victory over his incumbent opponent. Don’t miss this opportunity to meet Ed and hear his campaign strategy. We look forward to seeing you there!
**May 5th** 5:00pm -7:00pm**The Patio at 1578** 1578 State Route 129South Bristol, ME 04568[1578: Maine Events, Catering & Experiences (experience1578.com)](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=2657e4b10c&e=f8a0a76a2b)
| [Purchase Tickets Here ~ Please add guest names if purchasing multiple tickets. ~ Thank You ~](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=0e4d59f10c&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
Would you like to host an event? Let us know: events@thelanderforcongress.com Ed Thelander is a United States Navy veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not constitute or imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: Add your name: The Senate should pass the PRO Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Every worker deserves the power and the benefits of a union. The House of
Representatives recently passed the PRO Act (Protecting the Right to
Organize Act of 2021) and now the Senate must pass it as well.

The PRO Act will increase protections for workers who are unionizing their
workplaces. Unions are the backbone of the middle class and it is so
important that workers are able to collectively bargain.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105451?t=1002&akid=23136%2E1203867%2EJZH9qi ]Will you add your name right now to say that you support the PRO Act
and are pro-union?

Add your name

Henry Cuellar voted no on the PRO Act, and doesn’t fight for workers’
rights. I want our country’s workers to know that I will always have their
backs. Unlike my opponent, I’ll honor your work and fight to pass the PRO
Act making it easier to join unions. South TX deserves a real champion for
working class families in Congress.

I’m proud to have the support of Justice Democrats as we work to ensure
that workers are able to unionize their workplaces. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105451?t=1003&akid=23136%2E1203867%2EJZH9qi ]Will you add your
name right to join us in saying that the Senate must pass the PRO Act?

Thank you so much.

In solidarity,

Jessica Cisneros

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220501-23136-footer&t=1004&refcode2=23136_1203867_JZH9qi&akid=23136%2E1203867%2EJZH9qi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=23136%2E1203867%2EJZH9qi

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: 2022 RPV Advance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt for VA
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ab0cf50d577a/2022-rpv-advance?e=9ee2863374)
---
| |
---
| |
# The 2022 Republican Advance
Friends,

We just got back from the 2022 RPV Advance. What a time to be a Republican in Virginia!

We spent the last couple of days with like-minded activists from across the state that came to the Advance to work on building upon our successes in 2021. Governor Glenn Youngkin gave an amazing speech yesterday about the direction of the Commonwealth and what we as a party are doing to keep Virginia red, and what we are doing to ensure we take back the U.S. House

The highlight of the advance was being able to take my kids Saturday afternoon to hear the Governor speak. While my kids may not have paid attention to much, they were so excited to hear the Governor talk about ending the mask mandates in schools and saving our children.

My children are why I decided to run and to see their reaction to Governor Youngkin's speech re-ignited my passion and desire to defeat Gerry Connolly this November.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| | |
# How can you support our campaign?

1\. Show up and vote for our grassroots campaign on May 7. We can't take back the 11th District without your support.

Details for the May 7 Party Canvass (Commonly referred to as a Firehouse Primary), can be found
[**BY CLICKING HERE**](https://chappellforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2bbb67d628f97b4388ee28de&id=7ca8316f92&e=9ee2863374)

2\. DONATE - We can't do this without your support. If you can chip in **[$25, $50, $75, or $100](https://chappellforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2bbb67d628f97b4388ee28de&id=3406daae54&e=9ee2863374)** to our cause.
---
|
Thank you again for all the support we've received to date. I look forward to working with all of you to defeat Gerry Connolly in November!

Onward,

Matthew Chappell
